- Nexus autoscale localnet repeated-cycle flake fix (`integration_tests/tests/nexus/autoscale_localnet.rs`): relaxed strict cycle-1 scale-in transition enforcement when expansion never reached quorum via status signals (transition-log-only expansion path), while keeping contraction-profile checks and deterministic scale-out checks intact. Added `should_require_scale_in_transition(...)` gating and unit coverage to ensure strict scale-in checks run only when expansion status quorum was observed in-cycle.
- Tests: `cargo fmt --all` (ok), `cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod nexus::autoscale_localnet::tests::scale_in_transition_requirement -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod nexus::autoscale_localnet::nexus_autoscale_repeats_expand_contract_cycles_in_localnet -- --nocapture` (ok).
- Integration test stability fixes for DA/RBC timing and unstable-network round baselining (`crates/iroha_test_network/src/lib.rs`, `integration_tests/tests/extra_functional/connected_peers.rs`, `integration_tests/tests/extra_functional/unstable_network.rs`): added `Network::da_commit_quorum_timeout()` (`block_time + 4 * commit_time`) and used it to extend only the peer re-registration height wait in `connected_peers_with_f`, and corrected unstable-network round targeting/supply assertions to anchor from observed initial non-empty height (`initial_non_empty`) instead of a fixed `init_blocks` constant. This removes flakes where peers legitimately remained at height 2 during reconfiguration and where expected supply lagged observed non-empty height in 9-peer/2-fault rounds.
- Tests: `cargo fmt --all` (ok), `cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod extra_functional::connected_peers::connected_peers_with_f_1_0_1 -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod extra_functional::unstable_network::unstable_network_9_peers_2_faults -- --nocapture` (ok).
- Integration test stability fix for peer-topology transitions and localnet genesis replay (`crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop/votes.rs`, `crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop/tests.rs`, `crates/iroha_test_network/src/config.rs`): fixed vote-roster selection at `committed_height + 1` so vote/RBC validation uses the same active topology as pacemaker proposal assembly (prevents commit-QC stale-roster divergence during peer set changes), and hardened test-network genesis preparation to re-sign genesis canonically whenever metadata mutation leaves a stale signature even if execution results are already populated (prevents startup rejection: "Genesis block must be signed with genesis private key and not signed by any peer"). Added regressions `vote_roster_for_next_height_prefers_active_topology_over_commit_qc_history` and `ensure_genesis_results_resigns_mutated_genesis_with_existing_results`.
- Tests: `cargo fmt --all --check` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_test_network ensure_genesis_results_resigns_mutated_genesis_with_existing_results -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_core vote_roster_for_next_height_prefers_active_topology_over_commit_qc_history -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod extra_functional::connected_peers::register_new_peer -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod extra_functional::unregister_peer::network_stable_after_add_and_after_remove_peer -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod extra_functional::seven_peer_consistency::seven_peer_cross_peer_consistency_basic -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod extra_functional::unstable_network::soft_fork -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod nexus::cross_dataspace_localnet::cross_dataspace_atomic_swap_is_all_or_nothing -- --nocapture` (ok).

Validation: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_zk_conf_localnet_fast NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=/Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target/iroha-test-network/release/iroha3d KAGAMI_BIN=/Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target/debug/kagami IROHA_TESTUS_SIM_DURATION_SECS=420 IROHA_TESTUS_CHURN_INTERVAL_SECS=30 IROHA_TESTUS_LOAD_TPS=5 cargo test -p integration_tests --test testus_public_localnet -- --ignored --nocapture --test-threads=1 testus_public_localnet_5tps_churn_stability` (ok, `1 passed`, `0 failed`, `422.38s`; non-fatal joiner catch-up warnings observed as expected).
- SoraCloud scaffold security gap closure for first release (`crates/iroha_cli/src/soracloud.rs`, `docs/source/soracloud/cli_local_control_plane.md`, `roadmap.md`): removed placeholder scaffold auth and shipped deterministic challenge-signature auth core for generated `webapp` and `pii-app` APIs (`POST .../auth/challenge|login|logout`, `GET .../auth/me`), with Ed25519-only verification, canonical challenge message format, single-use replay protection, strict fail-closed runtime defaults, and shared auth/session state prefixes (`/state/auth/challenges`, `/state/auth/sessions`). Added capability-gated private route middleware (`pii.consent.grant`, `pii.consent.revoke`, `pii.records.retention.sweep`, `pii.records.delete`, `pii.records.read`), renamed the private template selector/path from `health-app` to `pii-app` with no alias compatibility, updated scaffold docs/readmes/tests for strict env contract + legacy selector rejection, added executable scaffold-auth coverage for replay/expiry/signature/session-sharing/capability enforcement plus strict startup fail-closed checks for weak `SESSION_HMAC_KEY`, invalid `AUTH_MODE`, and missing/invalid `AUTH_CAPABILITY_MAP_JSON`, and hardened decentralized semantics by: requiring external shared-state adapters by default in strict/production mode (`AUTH_REQUIRE_EXTERNAL_SHARED_STATE`, explicit `=0` only for local single-replica dev), enforcing adapter `putIfAbsent` support for deterministic replay-guard writes, adding challenge-consume lock records under `/state/auth/challenges/_meta/consume_locks` to serialize challenge consumption, and checking session-origin binding on every authenticated request (including missing-origin requests, which now fail closed when session/challenge origin is bound). Also hardened challenge-expiry determinism via cleanup markers under `/state/auth/challenges/_meta/expired` so expired logins return `AUTH_CHALLENGE_EXPIRED` instead of timing-dependent `AUTH_CHALLENGE_NOT_FOUND`, and kept static marker fallback assertions when `node` is unavailable so coverage remains fail-closed in minimal environments. Webapp smoke coverage now validates canonical challenge message construction, principal-mismatch rejection (`AUTH_CHALLENGE_PRINCIPAL_MISMATCH`), origin mismatch rejection (`AUTH_ORIGIN_MISMATCH`), private-route empty-capability-map rejection (`AUTH_CAPABILITY_MAP_REQUIRED`), per-request session-origin enforcement, hardened cookie flags, tampered-cookie rejection, and cross-replica logout invalidation. Pii-app smoke coverage now validates canonical challenge message construction, principal-mismatch/malformed/unknown/expired/replay rejection paths, full protected-route capability gating, and cross-replica session continuation/logout invalidation.

- SoraCloud rollback/rollout/agent signature compatibility hardening (`crates/iroha_torii/src/soracloud.rs`, `docs/source/soracloud/cli_local_control_plane.md`): switched Torii verification for `rollback`, `rollout`, and all agent control-plane mutations (`agent/deploy`, `agent/lease/renew`, `agent/restart`, `agent/policy/revoke`, `agent/wallet/spend`, `agent/wallet/approve`, `agent/message/send`, `agent/message/ack`, `agent/artifact/allow`, `agent/autonomy/run`) to canonical-first checks with legacy struct-layout fallback during migration. Added explicit legacy payload encoders, legacy-signing helper constructors, verification acceptance regressions, canonical-vs-legacy payload divergence regressions, and end-to-end legacy-admission coverage for rollback/rollout and agent-control lifecycle mutations.
- Tests: `cargo fmt --all -- crates/iroha_torii/src/soracloud.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_bundle_dm cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib legacy_struct_layout -- --nocapture` (ok; 22 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_bundle_dm cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib canonical_and_legacy_payload_layouts_differ -- --nocapture` (ok; 22 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_bundle_dm cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib accepts_legacy_signature_layout_end_to_end -- --nocapture` (ok; 5 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_bundle_dm cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib accept_legacy_signature_layout_end_to_end -- --nocapture` (ok; 3 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_bundle_dm cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib soracloud::tests:: -- --nocapture` (ok; 116 passed).
- SoraCloud training/model signature compatibility hardening (`crates/iroha_torii/src/soracloud.rs`, `docs/source/soracloud/cli_local_control_plane.md`): switched Torii verification for `training/job/start`, `training/job/checkpoint`, `training/job/retry`, `model/artifact/register`, `model/weight/register`, `model/weight/promote`, and `model/weight/rollback` to canonical-first checks with legacy struct-layout fallback during migration. Added legacy payload encoders for each operation plus regression coverage for legacy verification acceptance and canonical-vs-legacy payload divergence for every training/model signature family, then added end-to-end legacy-admission coverage for both training and model lifecycle mutation paths.

Added canonical-layout regressions for bundle/state-mutation payload encoders in Torii, bundle/state-mutation helper coverage in data model, Torii regressions for canonical-vs-legacy payload divergence, legacy-signature verification, delete-operation label mapping, invalid-signature rejection, and full legacy end-to-end `apply_state_mutation` acceptance, plus a CLI canonical-layout regression for bundle payload parity and explicit state-mutation signature-layout documentation.

Added new canonical helpers in `iroha_data_model` for `rollback`, `rollout`, and agent operations (`deploy`, `lease_renew`, `restart`, `policy_revoke`, `wallet_spend`, `wallet_approve`, `message_send`, `message_ack`, `artifact_allow`, `autonomy_run`) and rewired both CLI signing + Torii verification encoders to call these shared functions, removing remaining duplicated tuple-layout logic across the two crates.

- Testus public localnet 3600s soak stabilization follow-up (`integration_tests/tests/testus_public_localnet.rs`): kept lag-aware process-churn target selection, added timeout/connect-aware load submit retries (`LOAD_SUBMIT_RETRY_TIMEOUT_SECS=3`), and split churn scheduling so lagged process churn retries quickly (`next_process_churn_deadline`: 30s) while membership churn keeps interval+backoff (`next_membership_churn_deadline`). Validation: `NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_testus_soak cargo test -p integration_tests --test testus_public_localnet next_process_churn_deadline_ -- --nocapture` (`2 passed`), `... next_membership_churn_deadline_ -- --nocapture` (`2 passed`), `... churn_index_ -- --nocapture` (`6 passed`), and canonical soak rerun `NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 IROHA_TESTUS_KEEP_LOCALNET=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_testus_soak cargo test -p integration_tests --test testus_public_localnet -- --ignored --nocapture --test-threads=1 testus_public_localnet_5tps_churn_stability` (pass, `1 passed`, `3739.36s`; artifacts `target/testus-localnet/testus-simulation81TcCN/localnet/testus_simulation_summary.json`). Summary: `duration_secs=3600`, `scheduled_tps=5.1710`, `submitted_tps=5.1710`, `committed_tps=5.1698`, `tx_attempted=16371`, `tx_sent=16371`, `tx_submit_errors=0`, `process_churn_cycles=11`, `process_churn_lagged_cycles=0`, `membership_join_cycles=5`, `membership_leave_cycles=5`, `membership_churn_lagged_cycles=3`, `max_height_skew_observed=1`, `view_changes_start=0`, `view_changes_end=0`, `view_change_rate_per_sec=0`.
- Confidential + Testus localnet validation sweep (`integration_tests/tests/zk_confidential_localnet.rs`, `integration_tests/tests/testus_public_localnet.rs`): completed cargo-level rerun of confidential localnet using stable release peer binary and extended bounded Testus runtime coverage in the same warmed target dir. Validation: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_zk_conf_localnet_fast NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=/Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target/iroha-test-network/release/iroha3d KAGAMI_BIN=/Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target/debug/kagami IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PARALLELISM=16 cargo test -p integration_tests --test zk_confidential_localnet -- --test-threads=1` (ok, `23 passed`, `0 failed`, `225.88s`), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_zk_conf_localnet_fast NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 cargo test -p integration_tests --test testus_public_localnet --no-run` (ok), direct-binary helper subsets `warning_state_` (`2 passed`), `skew_breach_` (`3 passed`), `select_process_churn_index_` (`4 passed`), ignored localnet cases `--exact testus_localnet_joiner_register_unregister_behavior --ignored` (ok, `6.37s`) and `--exact testus_localnet_restart_catchup_behavior --ignored` (ok, `6.85s`), bounded churn run `--exact testus_public_localnet_5tps_churn_stability --ignored` with `IROHA_TESTUS_SIM_DURATION_SECS=120 IROHA_TESTUS_CHURN_INTERVAL_SECS=30 IROHA_TESTUS_LOAD_TPS=5` (ok, `121.25s`), and full non-ignored file run `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_zk_conf_localnet_fast NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=/Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target/iroha-test-network/release/iroha3d KAGAMI_BIN=/Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target/debug/kagami cargo test -p integration_tests --test testus_public_localnet -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (ok, `43 passed`, `3 ignored`, `4.46s`).
- Nexus matrix runner JSON success/failure bucketing (`scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh`): enriched machine-readable aggregates with `success` counts and `exit_code_counts` maps for both `cross` and `runtime`, enabling fast timeout/non-timeout failure attribution without CSV post-processing. Validation: `bash -n scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh` (ok), timeout smoke `scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh --cross-runs 1 --runtime-runs 1 --cross-soak-iterations 1 --runtime-bench-iterations 1 --cross-timeout-s 1 --runtime-timeout-s 1 --continue-on-failure --prefer-test-binary --summary-json-rows --target-dir /Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target --output-dir /tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_exitcodes_smoke --test-threads 1` (expected timeout rows), and JSON inspection `cat /tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_exitcodes_smoke/matrix_summary.json` (`cross.exit_code_counts={"124":1}`, `runtime.exit_code_counts={"124":1}`, `success=0` in both sections).
- Nexus autoscale localnet strict expansion gating + partial-load resilience (`integration_tests/tests/nexus/autoscale_localnet.rs`): hardened multilane autoscale localnet coverage by adding strict expansion mode that requires quorum deterministic scale-out transitions (and disables storage-only fallback when strict), separating cycle strictness so repeated-cycle keeps strict scale-out checks in both cycles while requiring deterministic scale-in transitions in cycle 1, and making round-robin load submission resilient to individual peer submit failures (continue on partial errors, fail only when all submissions fail). Added regression coverage for transition-only expansion signal (`expansion_accepts_scale_out_transition_quorum_without_status_signal`). Validation: `NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_autoscale_transition cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod nexus::autoscale_localnet::tests:: -- --nocapture` (`14 passed`), `... cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod nexus::autoscale_localnet::nexus_autoscale_repeats_expand_contract_cycles_in_localnet -- --nocapture` (pass, `1 passed`, `228.88s`, cycle1 `scale-out transitions 4/3`, cycle2 strict expansion via transitions `3/3`), and `... cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod nexus::autoscale_localnet::nexus_autoscale_expands_and_contracts_lanes_in_localnet -- --nocapture` (pass, `1 passed`, `202.32s`, cycle1 scale-out transitions `4/3`).
- Nexus matrix runner preflight dependency checks + JSON config metadata (`scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh`): added fail-fast command checks for required tooling (`python3`, `rg`) before any runs, and expanded `matrix_summary.json` to include a `config` section with full invocation settings (runs, iterations, timeouts, target/output dirs, execution flags). This makes artifacts self-describing and avoids late failures after long test execution. Validation: `bash -n scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh` (ok), runtime smoke `scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh --skip-cross --runtime-runs 1 --runtime-bench-iterations 1 --runtime-timeout-s 1 --continue-on-failure --prefer-test-binary --summary-json-rows --target-dir /Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target --output-dir /tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_config_smoke --test-threads 1` (expected timeout row), and JSON inspection `cat /tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_config_smoke/matrix_summary.json` (contains populated `config` plus typed `rows.runtime`).
- Nexus matrix runner cross-platform mtime probing (`scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh`): made prefer-binary candidate ordering portable by replacing macOS-only `stat -f` usage with `file_mtime_epoch(...)` fallback logic (`stat -f` on BSD/macOS, `stat -c` on GNU/Linux). This keeps `mod-*` discovery order deterministic across runner hosts. Validation: `bash -n scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh` (ok) and runtime-only smoke `scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh --skip-cross --runtime-runs 1 --runtime-bench-iterations 1 --runtime-timeout-s 1 --continue-on-failure --prefer-test-binary --target-dir /Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target --output-dir /tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_cross_platform_smoke --test-threads 1` (expected timeout row with successful test-binary resolution and unchanged output schema).
- Nexus matrix runner resolved-binary cache optimization (`scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh`): added per-filter resolved-binary caching (`CACHED_CROSS_TEST_BIN`, `CACHED_RUNTIME_TEST_BIN`) so repeated matrix iterations reuse previously validated `mod-*` paths instead of re-probing candidate binaries every run. Validation: `bash -n scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh` (ok) and cache smoke `scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh --skip-cross --runtime-runs 2 --runtime-bench-iterations 1 --runtime-timeout-s 1 --continue-on-failure --prefer-test-binary --target-dir /Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target --output-dir /tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_binary_cache_smoke --test-threads 1` (expected timeout rows with two runtime iterations and consistent resolved-binary reuse).
- Nexus matrix runner test-binary resolution hardening (`scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh`): fixed `--prefer-test-binary` selection so the runner no longer chooses `mod-*` by mtime alone. Resolution now verifies candidates actually contain the requested test filter via `--list` probing (`resolve_mod_test_binary_for_filter`) and emits explicit selection logs (`[matrix] resolved test binary for ...`) for traceability. Validation: `bash -n scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh` (ok), fake-target negative-path `scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh --skip-cross --runtime-runs 1 --prefer-test-binary --target-dir /tmp/iroha_fake_target --output-dir /tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_fake_target_check` (expected fast failure with filter-specific message), and real-target timeout smoke `scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh --skip-cross --runtime-runs 1 --runtime-bench-iterations 1 --runtime-timeout-s 1 --continue-on-failure --prefer-test-binary --target-dir /Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target --output-dir /tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_binary_resolution_smoke2 --test-threads 1` (expected timeout row and explicit resolved-binary log).
- Testus public localnet 3600s soak rerun with preserved artifacts (`integration_tests/tests/testus_public_localnet.rs`): validated the new process-churn rotation behavior (includes validator `peer0`) and widened transient skew guardrail by rerunning `testus_public_localnet_5tps_churn_stability` with `NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 IROHA_TESTUS_KEEP_LOCALNET=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_testus_soak cargo test -p integration_tests --test testus_public_localnet -- --ignored --nocapture --test-threads=1 testus_public_localnet_5tps_churn_stability` (pass, `1 passed`, `finished in 4079.24s`). - Nexus autoscale localnet expansion-threshold stabilization + latency-sample guard validation (`integration_tests/tests/nexus/autoscale_localnet.rs`, `crates/iroha_core/src/state.rs`): completed the remaining localnet determinism gap by validating new autoscale latency-sample guards in core (`autoscale_sample_latency_ms` rejects zero timestamps and clamps non-monotonic deltas to `1ms`) and tuning localnet autoscale latency thresholds to keep config invariants valid while reducing expansion flake on fresh startup (`scale_out_latency_ratio=0.1`, `scale_in_latency_ratio=0.05`, preserving `scale_in < scale_out`). Validation: `NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_autoscale_postguard cargo test -p iroha_core --lib autoscale_sample_latency_ms -- --nocapture` (`3 passed`), `... cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod nexus::autoscale_localnet::nexus_autoscale_expands_and_contracts_lanes_in_localnet -- --nocapture` (pass, `1 passed`, `225.70s`, cycle1 `scale-out peers with new transitions 4/4`), and `... nexus::autoscale_localnet::nexus_autoscale_repeats_expand_contract_cycles_in_localnet -- --nocapture` (pass, `1 passed`, `235.77s`, cycle1/2 `scale-out peers with new transitions 4/4`, strict cycle `scale-in peers since cycle start 4/4`).
- Nexus matrix runner JSON row-embedding option (`scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh`): extended machine-readable summary support with opt-in per-run row embedding via `--summary-json-rows`. When enabled, `matrix_summary.json` now includes typed `rows.cross` / `rows.runtime` arrays while preserving lightweight default output when the flag is omitted. Validation: `bash -n scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh` (ok), `scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh --help` (shows `--summary-json-rows`), and runtime-only smoke `scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh --skip-cross --runtime-runs 1 --runtime-bench-iterations 1 --runtime-timeout-s 120 --prefer-test-binary --summary-json-rows --target-dir /tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling --output-dir /tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_json_rows_smoke --test-threads 1` (ok; JSON row payload at `/tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_json_rows_smoke/matrix_summary.json` contains typed runtime row and empty cross rows).
- Nexus matrix runner machine-readable summaries (`scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh`): closed the remaining CI-ingestion gap by adding automatic JSON aggregate output alongside text summaries. The runner now emits `<output-dir>/matrix_summary.json` with deterministic `cross`/`runtime` aggregate metrics (`runs`, `fail`, `timed_out`, duration `min/avg/max`, and domain counters/pass-rate fields) plus `generated_at_utc`. Validation: `bash -n scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh` (ok), `scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh --help` (shows `matrix_summary.json`), timeout-path smoke `scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh --cross-runs 1 --runtime-runs 1 --cross-soak-iterations 1 --runtime-bench-iterations 1 --cross-timeout-s 1 --runtime-timeout-s 1 --continue-on-failure --prefer-test-binary --target-dir /tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling --output-dir /tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_json_smoke --test-threads 1` (expected timeout rows; JSON at `/tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_json_smoke/matrix_summary.json`), and runtime-only success smoke `scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh --skip-cross --runtime-runs 1 --runtime-bench-iterations 1 --runtime-timeout-s 120 --prefer-test-binary --target-dir /tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling --output-dir /tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_json_smoke_runtime --test-threads 1` (runtime success row; JSON at `/tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_json_smoke_runtime/matrix_summary.json` with `pass_rate_avg_percent=100.0`, `runs=1`).
- SORA parliament lifecycle smoke gap closure (`integration_tests/tests/sora_parliament_lifecycle_smoke.rs`): fixed two stale assumptions uncovered by full localnet execution. The unauthorized approval negative-path now uses the outsider account (alternates can legitimately approve in the current parliament model), and the rejection-path finalize flow no longer expects referendum status `Closed` immediately after `FinalizeReferendum` (current core behavior finalizes proposal status while referendum closure is height/enactment-driven). Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 integration_tests/tests/sora_parliament_lifecycle_smoke.rs` (ok) and `NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_sora_lifecycle_20260222 cargo test -p integration_tests --test sora_parliament_lifecycle_smoke -- --nocapture` (ok, `1 passed`, `finished in 290.09s`).
- Confidential localnet ZkNative behavior re-alignment + duplicate-nullifier stabilization (`integration_tests/tests/zk_confidential_localnet.rs`): after runtime verification on this workspace, restored ZkNative transparent-path tests to observed behavior capture (`confidential_zknative_transparent_mint_creates_public_balance_localnet`, `confidential_zknative_transparent_transfer_after_mint_localnet`) and removed the temporary rejection-only assumptions. Also fixed a flaky stale-read in `confidential_unshield_duplicate_nullifier_rejected` by replacing immediate balance reads with retry-based `wait_for_numeric_balance(...)` checks after first-unshield and duplicate-attempt barriers. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 integration_tests/tests/zk_confidential_localnet.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_zk_conf_localnet_fast NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 cargo test -p integration_tests --test zk_confidential_localnet --no-run` (ok), targeted runtime checks via built test binary with `IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=.../target/debug/iroha3d KAGAMI_BIN=.../target/debug/kagami IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PARALLELISM=16`: `--exact confidential_zknative_transparent_mint_creates_public_balance_localnet` (ok, `16.08s`), `--exact confidential_zknative_transparent_transfer_after_mint_localnet` (ok, `24.13s`), `--exact confidential_unshield_duplicate_nullifier_rejected` (ok, `25.82s`). Full-file rerun before the stale-read fix was `22 passed / 1 failed`; post-fix full-file rerun with stable release peer binary (`TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=/Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target/iroha-test-network/release/iroha3d`) is now `23 passed / 0 failed` in `258.86s`.
- Confidential localnet per-transaction real Halo2 proof generation + quorum poll hardening (`integration_tests/tests/zk_confidential_localnet.rs`): replaced shared cached fixture attachments with per-call real Halo2 backend proof generation (`live_halo2_attachment`) via `iroha_core::zk::test_utils::halo2_ivm_execution_envelope(...)`, so each `ZkTransfer`/`Unshield` submission now constructs a fresh inline `ProofAttachment` from real backend-produced envelope bytes. Also hardened quorum fallback polling with temporary mute-on-error-streak logic (`STATUS_ERROR_STREAK_FOR_MUTE=3`, `MUTED_PEER_COOLDOWN_ATTEMPTS=5`) while preserving quorum safety (`should_temporarily_mute_peer` prevents muting below quorum-capable active peers), and extended fallback wait horizon (`ATTEMPTS=200`, `DELAY=300ms`) after an observed non-empty progression timeout under load. Added focused helper coverage for mute/quorum logic. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 integration_tests/tests/zk_confidential_localnet.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_zk_conf_localnet_fast NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=/Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target/debug/iroha3d IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PARALLELISM=16 cargo test -p integration_tests --test zk_confidential_localnet -- --test-threads=1` (pre-horizon-adjustment run: `22 passed`, `1 failed` at `confidential_zknative_transparent_transfer_after_mint_localnet` due non-empty block timeout at target `3` after bounded waits; `finished in 368.25s`). Post-adjustment targeted reruns were started but are currently blocked by pre-existing long-running/stalled cargo processes in the workspace (no CPU progress), and were left untouched per repository rule not to kill `cargo`/`rustc` without explicit user request.
- Nexus matrix runner auto-aggregate summaries (`scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh`): removed manual post-run `awk` dependency by adding built-in aggregate output for both cross/runtime matrices. The runner now emits `<output-dir>/matrix_summary.txt` and prints `cross_summary`/`runtime_summary` lines with run counts, fail/timeout counts, duration `min/avg/max`, and domain metrics (`soak_pass_rate`, fallback/retry counts, runtime pass-rate average, delta maxima, zero-delta note count). Validation: `bash -n scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh` (ok), `scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh --help` (shows new `matrix_summary.txt` output), fast timeout smoke `scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh --cross-runs 1 --runtime-runs 1 --cross-soak-iterations 1 --runtime-bench-iterations 1 --cross-timeout-s 1 --runtime-timeout-s 1 --continue-on-failure --prefer-test-binary --target-dir /tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling --output-dir /tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_summary_smoke --test-threads 1` (expected timeout rows; summary emitted), and runtime-only success smoke `scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh --skip-cross --runtime-runs 1 --runtime-bench-iterations 1 --runtime-timeout-s 120 --prefer-test-binary --target-dir /tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling --output-dir /tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_summary_smoke_runtime --test-threads 1` (runtime success row with `cross_summary runs=0` + `runtime_summary runs=1`).
- Nexus matrix runner 5x5 direct-binary aggregate sample (`scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh`): completed a combined cross/runtime matrix using `--cross-runs 5 --runtime-runs 5 --prefer-test-binary --cross-timeout-s 240 --runtime-timeout-s 180 --cross-soak-iterations 1 --runtime-bench-iterations 1 --test-threads 1` against warm artifacts in `/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling`. Cross aggregate (`/tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_smoke6/cross_dataspace_matrix.csv`): `rows=5`, `fail=0`, `timed_out=0`, duration `min/avg/max=77/83.60/93s`, `soak_fallbacks_total=4`, `soak_retries_total=0`, `swap_nonconverged_total=0`. Runtime aggregate (`/tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_smoke6/runtime_registration_matrix.csv`): `rows=5`, `fail=0`, `timed_out=0`, duration `min/avg/max=31/34.80/37s`, `pass_rate_avg=100.00`, `submitter_delta_max=0`, `cluster_delta_max=0`, `note_zero_delta_rows=5`. This confirms the hardened runner can execute mixed cross/runtime matrices end-to-end with bounded per-run timeout semantics and no result regression under prebuilt-binary mode.
- Nexus autoscale localnet repeated-cycle closure (`crates/iroha_core/src/state.rs`, `integration_tests/tests/nexus/autoscale_localnet.rs`): fixed strict-cycle false negatives by evaluating required `scale-in` transitions against cycle baseline snapshots (not only post-expansion deltas), wiring strict contraction waits to the same baseline, and disabling contraction heartbeat writes in strict mode so probe traffic does not distort low-utilization windows. Also normalized localnet autoscale utilization sampling with `per_lane_target_tps=40` so expansion/contraction transitions are observable under the existing synthetic burst profile while keeping ratio invariants valid (`scale_in < scale_out`). Core autoscale now uses a dedicated scale-in predicate helper (`autoscale_scale_in_triggered`) and no longer gates scale-in on latency ratio. Validation: `cargo test -p iroha_core autoscale_scale_in_triggered -- --nocapture` (new predicate unit tests pass: `2 passed`), `NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_autoscale_gapfill cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod nexus::autoscale_localnet::tests:: -- --nocapture` (`13 passed`), `... nexus::autoscale_localnet::nexus_autoscale_repeats_expand_contract_cycles_in_localnet -- --nocapture` (pass, `1 passed`, `358.43s`, cycle1/2 `scale-in peers since cycle start 4/4`), and `... nexus::autoscale_localnet::nexus_autoscale_expands_and_contracts_lanes_in_localnet -- --nocapture` (pass, `1 passed`, `445.23s`, cycle1 `scale-in peers since cycle start 4/4`).
- Nexus matrix runner resilience follow-up (`scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh`): hardened matrix execution controls to avoid one stuck leg blocking all sampling by adding `--skip-cross`/`--skip-runtime`, optional per-run timeouts (`--cross-timeout-s`, `--runtime-timeout-s`, disabled by default), deterministic cargo parallelism control (`--cargo-jobs`, default `1`), `--prefer-test-binary` (run prebuilt `mod-*` test binary from `<target-dir>/debug/deps` to avoid cargo rebuild loops), and default `NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1` injection (opt-out: `--no-skip-bindings-sync`) so fresh-target runs do not fail on missing JDK binding parity checks. CSV outputs include `timed_out` columns for both cross/runtime rows. Validation: `bash -n scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh` (ok), `scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh --help` (ok), guard-path check `scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh --skip-cross --skip-runtime` (expected fast failure: `No runs selected: enable at least one of cross/runtime runs.`), and prefer-binary missing-artifact check `scripts/nexus/run_cross_runtime_matrix.sh --skip-cross --runtime-runs 1 --prefer-test-binary --target-dir /tmp/iroha_no_such_target_dir` (expected fast failure: `Unable to locate executable mod-* test binary ...`). Smoke evidence: `/tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_cross_smoke3/cross_dataspace_matrix.csv` completed new-schema cargo-path cross row (`run=1`, `exit=0`, `timed_out=0`, `soak_passed=1/1`, `duration_s=832`); `/tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_cross_smoke4/cross_dataspace_matrix.csv` completed successful direct-binary cross row (`run=1`, `exit=0`, `timed_out=0`, `soak_passed=1/1`, `duration_s=78`); `/tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_runtime_smoke/runtime_registration_matrix.csv` recorded non-timeout runtime failure row (`exit=101`, missing-JDK Norito parity path before default skip), `/tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_runtime_smoke2/runtime_registration_matrix.csv` recorded bounded timeout row (`exit=124`, `timed_out=1`, `duration_s=600`), `/tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_runtime_smoke4/runtime_registration_matrix.csv` recorded successful direct-binary runtime row (`run=1`, `exit=0`, `timed_out=0`, `duration_s=33`, `pass_rate=100.0`, delta max `0/0`), and combined matrix smoke `/tmp/iroha_nexus_matrix_smoke5/{cross_dataspace_matrix.csv,runtime_registration_matrix.csv}` recorded successful cross+runtime rows in one invocation (`cross: exit=0 timed_out=0 duration_s=79`, `runtime: exit=0 timed_out=0 duration_s=21 pass_rate=100.0`).
- Confidential localnet all-peer wait timeout hardening under real proof verification (`integration_tests/tests/zk_confidential_localnet.rs`): bounded `submit_and_wait_non_empty_block` all-peer non-empty wait with `tokio::time::timeout` (`ALL_PEER_WAIT_TIMEOUT=15s`) before quorum fallback (`wait_for_non_empty_quorum`) to avoid prolonged stalls when one peer becomes temporarily unreachable during Halo2-proof flows. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 integration_tests/tests/zk_confidential_localnet.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_zk_conf_localnet_fast NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=/Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target/debug/iroha3d IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PARALLELISM=16 cargo test -p integration_tests --test zk_confidential_localnet -- --test-threads=1 confidential_public_and_shielded_three_hop_localnet` (ok, `34.01s`), and full suite rerun `... cargo test -p integration_tests --test zk_confidential_localnet -- --test-threads=1` (ok, `20 passed`, `258.45s`). A concurrently running pre-hardening full suite from before this patch also completed later at `20 passed` in `891.39s`, confirming the timeout cap reduced worst-case wait overhead without changing outcomes.
- Closed the Apalache formal-model liveness gap in `docs/formal/sumeragi/Sumeragi.tla`: added explicit enable predicates and post-GST scheduler guards so `TimeoutTick` and `ByzantineFault` cannot preempt enabled non-timeout progress actions (`Honest*` and `Rbc*` progress), eliminating the previous post-GST starvation/no-op lasso counterexample.

- Canonical Izanami 3600s soak rerun (`RUST_LOG=izanami::summary=info,izanami::workload=warn ... --duration 3600s --target-blocks 2000 --tps 5 --max-inflight 8 --workload-profile stable`): artifacts at `/tmp/izanami_soak_20260223T043425_codex_3600s.log` and `/var/folders/n2/xxntlr312qbfdnp0j1xp52hw0000gn/T/irohad_test_network_lIA9iV`. Run failed with `no block height progress for 300s (quorum min height 138, strict min 65, target 2000, tolerated_failures 1)` at `crates/izanami/src/chaos.rs:1540`; summary `successes=398 failures=15 expected_failures=0 unexpected_successes=0 izanami_ingress_failover_total=70 izanami_ingress_endpoint_unhealthy_total=59`. - Added bounded exhaustive Sumeragi state-machine model tests for BFT safety/liveness under Byzantine faults (`crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop/tests/state_machine_model_tests.rs`, wired from `crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop/tests.rs`). The model now covers permissioned/NPoS `N=3f+1` (`N=4`, `N=7`) with vote/QC equivocation, invalid signature/QC, stale replay/mode mismatch, RBC corruption/conflict/withholding/insufficient-ready, recovery FSM escalation/recovery, and NPoS stake-quorum invariants. Model config derivation now falls back to trusted-peer validator topology when commit topology is temporarily empty (matching runtime fallback behavior) so bounded runs are robust at startup. Validation: `cargo fmt --all`; `cargo test -p iroha_core --lib state_machine_model_tests:: -- --nocapture` (ok, 12 passed).
- Canonical Izanami 3600s soak rerun after stack-overflow recursion guard (`/tmp/izanami_soak_20260222T131236_codex_3600s.log`, network dir `/var/folders/n2/xxntlr312qbfdnp0j1xp52hw0000gn/T/irohad_test_network_yJqKuh`): ran the unchanged canonical command (`RUST_LOG=izanami::summary=info,izanami::workload=warn`, 4 peers, `--duration 3600s --target-blocks 2000 --tps 5 --max-inflight 8`) and it failed with `no block height progress for 300s (quorum min height 127, strict min 127, target 2000, tolerated_failures 1)` at `crates/izanami/src/chaos.rs:1502`. Terminal summary: `successes=551 failures=17 expected_failures=0 unexpected_successes=0 izanami_ingress_failover_total=80 izanami_ingress_endpoint_unhealthy_total=52`. All peer stderr logs were empty (`0B`) and no stack-overflow signatures were observed; peers converged then stalled at `lane_000_core` height `127/127/127/127` (from `blocks.hashes` sizes). Dominant run-time warnings were ingress/workload `transaction queued for too long` and `haven't got tx confirmation within 20s` plus peer-side `missing_qc` / `no proposal observed` churn.
- Canonical Izanami 3600s soak rerun (`/tmp/izanami_soak_20260222T043549_codex_3600s.log`, network dir `/var/folders/n2/xxntlr312qbfdnp0j1xp52hw0000gn/T/irohad_test_network_EDoxPo`): executed the unchanged canonical command (`RUST_LOG=izanami::summary=info,izanami::workload=warn`, 4 peers, `--duration 3600s --target-blocks 2000 --tps 5 --max-inflight 8`) and the run failed early with `no block height progress for 300s (quorum min height 30, strict min 30, target 2000, tolerated_failures 1)` at `crates/izanami/src/chaos.rs:1502` (exit code 1). Terminal summary: `successes=126 failures=18 expected_failures=0 unexpected_successes=0 izanami_ingress_failover_total=55 izanami_ingress_endpoint_unhealthy_total=48`. During the run, two peers aborted with stack overflows in `sumeragi-tick` (`aware_elver`, `prevalent_mammoth`; `run-1-stderr.log` contains `thread 'sumeragi-tick' ... has overflowed its stack`), after which workload logs showed repeated `Connection refused`, `operation timed out`, and `transaction queued for too long` on ingress retries.
- No-roster starvation root-cause hardening landed in Sumeragi recovery (`crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop{.rs,/votes.rs,/commit.rs,/reschedule.rs,/tests.rs}`): added explicit per-(height,view) roster bootstrap state (`RosterReady`/`RosterBootstrapPending`/`RosterBootstrapExhausted`), deterministic pre-fail-closed bootstrap reacquire ordering (highest-QC fetch, parent-gap fetch, anchor range-pull, commit-topology refresh), and a deterministic refresh-then-single-fallback allowance per view before fail-closed escalation. No-roster fallback budgeting is now timeout-aware via `effective_no_roster_fallback_views = clamp(1..cap, ceil(quorum_timeout/propose_timeout))` with cap from config; fail-closed remains safety-first and once-per-view. Updated no-roster fallback call sites in commit/vote/reschedule paths to handle `AllowFallback` vs `BootstrapPending` vs `FailClosed`, added regression coverage for pending-window suppression prevention, and exposed `consensus_no_roster_fallback_total`, `consensus_no_roster_fallback_allowed_total`, and `consensus_no_roster_fail_closed_total` in Torii status JSON (`crates/iroha_torii/src/routing/consensus.rs`). Tuned Izanami fast profile recovery knobs (`crates/izanami/src/chaos.rs`) with explicit deterministic values: `missing_qc_reacquire_window_ms=450`, `no_roster_fallback_views=2`, `no_roster_refresh_retry_per_view=2`. Validation passed: `cargo fmt --all`; `cargo test -p iroha_core --lib proposal_liveness_state_machine_tests:: -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p iroha_core --lib no_roster_bootstrap_prevents_premature_fallback_suppression -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p iroha_core --lib force_view_change_if_idle_reacquires_missing_qc_once_before_rotating -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p iroha_core --lib unknown_prev_fallback_anchor_selects_deterministic_start_height -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p iroha_torii status_snapshot_json_includes_recovery_reacquire_fields -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p izanami derive_npos_timing_ -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p izanami make_network_builder_applies_pipeline_time -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p izanami make_network_builder_injects_npos_parameters -- --nocapture`.
- Canonical Izanami 3600s soak rerun after sub-1s tuning tranche (`/tmp/izanami_soak_20260222T001931_impl_3600s.log`, network dir `/var/folders/n2/xxntlr312qbfdnp0j1xp52hw0000gn/T/irohad_test_network_I5J2ZU`): executed the unchanged canonical command (`RUST_LOG=izanami::summary=info,izanami::workload=warn`, 4 peers, `--duration 3600s --target-blocks 2000 --tps 5 --max-inflight 8`) and the run terminated early on strict divergence (`crates/izanami/src/chaos.rs:1459`) before the 3600s window elapsed: `height divergence exceeded safety window (divergence 9, threshold 2, window 30s, quorum min 13, strict min 4, target 2000, tolerated_failures 1)`. Terminal summary: `successes=26 failures=0 expected_failures=0 unexpected_successes=0 izanami_ingress_failover_total=7 izanami_ingress_endpoint_unhealthy_total=4`; peer stderr logs remained empty (`0B`). Peer stdout sizes: `8,289`, `4,722`, `6,843`, `1,513` bytes. Warning sample counts from peer stdout: `no proposal observed for view before changing view=3`, `no-roster fallback budget exhausted=6`, `invalid signature=0`, `signature mismatch=0`.
- Implemented the sub-1s localnet tuning tranche in Izanami (`crates/izanami/src/chaos.rs`): updated fast NPoS timing defaults to `block_time_ms=180` / `commit_time_ms=180`, reduced DA quorum multiplier to `1`, added explicit DA availability overrides (`availability_timeout_multiplier=1`, `availability_timeout_floor_ms=250`), tightened recovery windows (`height_window_ms=600`, `missing_qc_reacquire_window_ms=250`, `deferred_qc_ttl_ms=600`, `missing_block_height_ttl_ms=600`), and added per-phase timeout floors in `derive_npos_timing` (`propose>=40ms`, `prevote>=60ms`, `precommit>=80ms`) while preserving commit/DA clamp-to-commit behavior. Extended existing unit coverage/assertions to verify the new floors and config-layer writes. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/izanami/src/chaos.rs` (ok), `cargo test -p izanami derive_npos_timing_ -- --nocapture` (ok; 2 passed), `cargo test -p izanami make_network_builder_applies_pipeline_time -- --nocapture` (ok; 1 passed), `cargo test -p izanami make_network_builder_injects_npos_parameters -- --nocapture` (ok; 1 passed).

- Nexus autoscale localnet repeated-cycle gap isolation follow-up (`integration_tests/tests/nexus/autoscale_localnet.rs`): preserved single-cycle localnet behavior while converting repeated-cycle validation into an explicit deterministic scale-in requirement. `run_expand_contract_cycle` now accepts `require_scale_in_transition`; after contraction it asserts quorum `scale-in` transition deltas (from per-peer autoscale transition logs) when strict mode is enabled. Single-cycle test runs with strict mode off; repeated-cycle test runs with strict mode on for each cycle, failing immediately when contraction is status-observed but no deterministic scale-in transitions are emitted. Validation: `NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_autoscale_gapfill cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod nexus::autoscale_localnet::tests:: -- --nocapture` (ok, `13 passed`), `TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=/Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target/iroha-test-network/release/iroha3d IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_autoscale_gapfill cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod nexus::autoscale_localnet::nexus_autoscale_expands_and_contracts_lanes_in_localnet -- --nocapture` (ok; contraction status observed, `scale-in transitions 0/4`), `... nexus::autoscale_localnet::nexus_autoscale_repeats_expand_contract_cycles_in_localnet -- --nocapture` (fails in cycle 1 with explicit assertion: contraction observed but deterministic `scale-in` transitions remain `0/4`, quorum required `3`). This narrows the remaining issue to functional autoscale scale-in emission rather than expansion probe ambiguity.
- Nexus autoscale localnet transition-counter diagnostics follow-up (`integration_tests/tests/nexus/autoscale_localnet.rs`): added explicit autoscale lifecycle transition observability by parsing per-peer `run-*-stdout.log` markers for deterministic autoscale transitions (`scale-out` / `scale-in`) and wiring transition snapshots into expansion fallback diagnostics/timeouts plus cycle-level phase logs. Also hardened cycle execution by skipping cooldown-clearance gating for cycle 1, and by treating transient status-snapshot streaks in heartbeat waits as timeout-scoped retries instead of immediate aborts. Added unit coverage for transition-marker parsing and baseline delta counting; focused helper suite now passes (`NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_autoscale_gapfill cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod nexus::autoscale_localnet::tests:: -- --nocapture`, `13 passed`). Localnet validation with prebuilt binary override (`TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=/Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target/iroha-test-network/release/iroha3d IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 ...`) shows: single-cycle test passes but only via storage+progress fallback and reports `scale-out transitions 4/4` with `scale-in transitions 0/4`; repeated-cycle test consistently fails in cycle 2 expansion with transition snapshot stuck at `scale_out=1, scale_in=0` on all peers and no lane-1 status activity (`capacity=0, committed=0`, `lane_governance_ids=[0]`), plus occasional Torii status timeouts on one peer under sustained probe load. This confirms a remaining functional autoscale lifecycle gap: no observed deterministic scale-in transition, so true contraction/re-expansion cycling is not achieved.
- Nexus autoscale localnet strict contraction/transition validation follow-up (`integration_tests/tests/nexus/autoscale_localnet.rs`): hardened expansion fallback semantics to require elastic-lane storage progression on quorum peers (added elastic storage snapshots/stats), raised probe cadence/intensification (`EXPANSION_PROBE_INTERVAL=250ms`, `EXPANSION_POST_STORAGE_TOP_UP_TX_COUNT=64`), added cooldown-clearance gating between cycles, and tightened contraction semantics to require lane-1 undeclaration+idle (not just `capacity=0`). Added deterministic helper coverage for storage progression and updated contraction fixture semantics; focused unit validation now passes (`NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_autoscale_gapfill cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod nexus::autoscale_localnet::tests:: -- --nocapture`, `11 passed`). Localnet validation with prebuilt binary override (`TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=/Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target/iroha-test-network/release/iroha3d IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 ...`) now exposes a functional gap: both `nexus::autoscale_localnet::nexus_autoscale_expands_and_contracts_lanes_in_localnet` and `nexus::autoscale_localnet::nexus_autoscale_repeats_expand_contract_cycles_in_localnet` fail by timeout while lane 1 stays declared in status with zero capacity/commit (`lane_id=1` persists across peers, `lane_governance_ids=[0]`, validator snapshot zeros), so prior pass conditions were accepting residual lane directories/counters rather than true contraction/re-expansion.
- Confidential localnet real backend proof coverage (`integration_tests/tests/zk_confidential_localnet.rs`): replaced all debug placeholder proof attachments (`debug/ok`) with real `halo2/ipa` fixture attachments via `iroha_core::zk::test_utils::halo2_fixture_envelope("halo2/ipa:tiny-add-v1", ...)`, enabled Halo2 verification in localnet bootstrap (`zk.halo2.enabled=true`, `confidential.verify_timeout_ms=600000`), and added quorum fallback (`wait_for_non_empty_quorum`) when all-peer non-empty block waits time out with only a minority lagging peer under heavier proof verification load. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 integration_tests/tests/zk_confidential_localnet.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_zk_conf_localnet_fast NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=/Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target/debug/iroha3d IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PARALLELISM=16 cargo test -p integration_tests --test zk_confidential_localnet -- --test-threads=1 confidential_public_and_shielded_three_hop_localnet` (ok, `40.64s`), and full suite rerun `... cargo test -p integration_tests --test zk_confidential_localnet -- --test-threads=1` (ok, `17 passed`, `345.19s`).
- `iroha_cli` integration-test binary-resolution hardening (`integration_tests/tests/iroha_cli.rs`): added deterministic `TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHA` priming from existing build artifacts (including `target[/...]/iroha-test-network/{debug,release}/iroha`) with capability check (`app soracloud --help` must advertise `training-job-start`) to avoid stale binary reuse; defaulted this test file to `IROHA_TEST_BUILD_PROFILE=debug` when unset to cut nested rebuild overhead. Added helper coverage: `find_existing_cli_binary_path_from_roots_returns_first_match`, `find_existing_cli_binary_path_from_roots_returns_none_when_missing`, `binary_supports_training_job_commands_rejects_missing_binary`, `binary_supports_training_job_commands_rejects_help_without_subcommand`, and `binary_supports_training_job_commands_accepts_help_with_subcommand`. Validation: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_cli_training cargo test -p integration_tests --test iroha_cli find_existing_cli_binary_path_from_roots_ -- --nocapture` (ok; 2 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_siglayout cargo test -p integration_tests --test iroha_cli binary_supports_training_job_commands_ -- --nocapture` (ok; 3 passed), and Soracloud lifecycle rerun `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_cli_training cargo test -p integration_tests --test iroha_cli soracloud_training_and_model_weight_lifecycle_use_live_torii_control_plane -- --nocapture` (ok; 1 passed, no stale-command mismatch).
- SoraCloud training/model signature canonicalization fix (`crates/iroha_cli/src/soracloud.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/src/soracloud.rs`, `integration_tests/tests/iroha_cli.rs`): fixed live Torii `invalid_signature` failures for `training-job-start` and related model lifecycle mutations by switching provenance payload signing from crate-local struct encodings to explicit tuple-canonical encodings shared by CLI and Torii (`training/job/start|checkpoint|retry`, `model/artifact/register`, `model/weight/register|promote|rollback`). Validation: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_cli_training cargo test -p iroha_cli --bin iroha soracloud::tests::signed_ -- --nocapture` (ok; 20 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_cli_training cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib soracloud::tests::training_job_ -- --nocapture` (ok; 2 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_cli_training cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib soracloud::tests::model_weight_ -- --nocapture` (ok; 2 passed), `IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_cli_training cargo test -p integration_tests --test iroha_cli soracloud_training_and_model_weight_lifecycle_use_live_torii_control_plane -- --nocapture` (ok; 1 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_cli_training cargo test -p integration_tests --test iroha_cli --no-run` (ok).
- Fraud-monitoring assessment enforcement fix (`crates/iroha_core/src/block.rs`, `crates/iroha/src/client.rs`): ensured fraud-policy checks execute before stateless-cache early-return in execution-stage validation so cached transactions cannot bypass `required_minimum_band` / missing-assessment rejection. Added regression `validate_keep_voting_block_enforces_fraud_policy_with_stateless_cache` and tightened tx confirmation stream handling so a block `Applied` event with polling enabled re-checks final tx status before returning success (rejection/expired now win deterministically). Validation: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/codex-target-clientfix cargo test -p iroha polling_block_event_ -- --nocapture`, `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/codex-target-clientfix cargo test -p iroha_core --lib validate_keep_voting_block_enforces_fraud_policy_with_stateless_cache -- --nocapture`, `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/codex-target-clientfix cargo test -p integration_tests fraud_monitoring_requires_assessment_bands -- --nocapture` (target test now `ok`, `finished in 248.88s`).
- SoraCloud training job orchestration runtime (`crates/iroha_torii/src/{soracloud.rs,lib.rs}`, `docs/source/soracloud/cli_local_control_plane.md`, `roadmap.md`): added signed Torii control-plane endpoints for distributed training lifecycle (`POST /v1/soracloud/training/job/start`, `POST /v1/soracloud/training/job/checkpoint`, `POST /v1/soracloud/training/job/retry`, `GET /v1/soracloud/training/job/status`) with deterministic admission and metering semantics: service-level `allow_model_training` gating, worker-group/retry bounds, monotonic checkpoint cadence enforcement, compute/storage budget accounting, and persisted training runtime + append-only audit events.
- SoraCloud model/weight registry runtime (`crates/iroha_torii/src/{soracloud.rs,lib.rs}`, `docs/source/soracloud/cli_local_control_plane.md`, `roadmap.md`): added signed model-weight lifecycle endpoints (`POST /v1/soracloud/model/weight/register`, `POST /v1/soracloud/model/weight/promote`, `POST /v1/soracloud/model/weight/rollback`, `GET /v1/soracloud/model/weight/status`) with deterministic version-lineage checks (`parent_version` policy), completed-training-job gating, promotion-gate approval enforcement, rollback target validation, and persisted model-weight registry/audit state.
- SoraCloud secure artifact-attestation pipeline (`crates/iroha_torii/src/{soracloud.rs,lib.rs}`, `docs/source/soracloud/cli_local_control_plane.md`, `roadmap.md`): added signed artifact endpoints (`POST /v1/soracloud/model/artifact/register`, `GET /v1/soracloud/model/artifact/status`) and enforced attestation-linked weight registration so model versions can only be registered when attested artifact metadata exists for the same completed training job and matches declared `dataset_ref`/`weight_artifact_hash`/`training_config_hash`/`reproducibility_hash`/`provenance_attestation_hash`; successful registration marks attestation consumption (`consumed_by_version`).
- SoraCloud SCR host integration completion (`crates/iroha_torii/src/soracloud.rs`, `docs/source/soracloud/cli_local_control_plane.md`, `roadmap.md`): implemented deterministic SCR host admission + lifecycle snapshots for service deploy/upgrade/rollback by enforcing bounded resource/lifecycle caps, capability-policy compatibility (`allow_state_writes` vs binding mutability), network allowlist hygiene, deterministic `sandbox_profile_hash` derivation, and monotonic process lifecycle markers (`process_generation`, `process_started_sequence`) recorded per admitted revision.
- SoraCloud model-training benchmark completion (`crates/iroha_torii/src/soracloud.rs`, `docs/source/soracloud/cli_local_control_plane.md`, `roadmap.md`): added deterministic benchmark regressions covering training throughput + persisted checkpoint recovery (`training_benchmark_throughput_and_checkpoint_recovery_are_deterministic`) and deterministic promotion-policy enforcement (`promotion_policy_benchmark_gate_enforcement_is_deterministic`), then marked roadmap item `SORACLOUD-MODEL-TRAINING` complete.
- SoraCloud roadmap closeout (`roadmap.md`): promoted `SORACLOUD-WEB-FOUNDATION`, `SORACLOUD-AI-APARTMENTS`, `SORACLOUD-FHE-PRIVATE-DATA`, and `SORACLOUD-HEALTH-DATA-PACK` from `In Progress` to `Completed` now that every listed implementation subtask for items 35-40 is checked and validated in prior targeted Torii/data-model/CLI/integration test runs.

- SoraCloud health-access consent + compliance report pack + privacy/security matrix (`crates/iroha_data_model/src/soracloud.rs`, `crates/iroha_data_model/tests/soracloud_manifest_fixtures.rs`, `fixtures/soracloud/{decryption_authority_policy_v1,decryption_request_v1}.json`, `crates/iroha_torii/src/{soracloud.rs,lib.rs}`, `docs/source/soracloud/cli_local_control_plane.md`, `roadmap.md`): completed regulated health workload runtime surface by extending decryption disclosure responses/audit events with deterministic `policy_snapshot_hash` metadata, adding signed `GET /v1/soracloud/health/compliance/report` (filterable by `service_name`/`jurisdiction_tag`, bounded by `limit`) that emits access-log counts, consent-evidence coverage, jurisdiction stats, encrypted-binding data-flow attestations, and policy diff history, and adding explicit matrix regressions for least-privilege scope enforcement, unauthorized signature rejection, and evidence completeness reporting.
- Tests: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_torii/src/soracloud.rs crates/iroha_torii/src/lib.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_health cargo test -p iroha_torii soracloud::tests::decryption_request_ -- --nocapture` (ok; 5 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_health cargo test -p iroha_torii soracloud::tests::health_compliance_ -- --nocapture` (ok; 1 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_health cargo test -p iroha_torii soracloud::tests::health_privacy_matrix_ -- --nocapture` (ok; 3 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_health cargo test -p iroha_torii soracloud::tests:: -- --nocapture` (ok; 28 passed).
- SoraCloud privacy-preserving ciphertext query interface + conformance suite (`crates/iroha_data_model/src/soracloud.rs`, `crates/iroha_data_model/tests/soracloud_manifest_fixtures.rs`, `fixtures/soracloud/{ciphertext_query_spec_v1,ciphertext_query_response_v1}.json`, `crates/iroha_torii/src/{soracloud.rs,lib.rs}`, `docs/source/soracloud/manifest_schemas.md`, `roadmap.md`): added versioned ciphertext query schemas (`CiphertextQuerySpecV1`, `CiphertextQueryResponseV1`, `CiphertextInclusionProofV1`) with deterministic validation for bounded result windows, metadata-projection non-disclosure (`Minimal` vs `Standard`), and proof envelope consistency. Torii runtime now persists ciphertext runtime records for encrypted state mutations/FHE outputs and serves signed `POST /v1/soracloud/ciphertext/query` responses with disclosure-minimized metadata and audit-anchor inclusion proofs. Conformance coverage now asserts plaintext-binding rejection, binding-prefix scope enforcement, minimal-metadata key non-disclosure, and deterministic cross-registry query parity.
- SoraCloud FHE governance model + deterministic execution policy (`crates/iroha_data_model/src/soracloud.rs`, `crates/iroha_data_model/tests/soracloud_manifest_fixtures.rs`, `fixtures/soracloud/fhe_{param_set,execution_policy,governance_bundle}_v1.json`, `docs/source/soracloud/manifest_schemas.md`, `roadmap.md`): added first-class `FheParamSetV1` (versioned `fhe_param_set` with lifecycle/status + activation/deprecation/withdraw heights), `FheExecutionPolicyV1` (deterministic ciphertext admission/compute limits + rounding mode), and `FheGovernanceBundleV1` (cross-schema admission validation). Validation now enforces modulus/profile bounds, lifecycle ordering, policy size/fan-in/fan-out constraints, parameter-policy identity/version matching, depth ceiling checks, and rejects `Proposed`/`Withdrawn` parameter sets for new execution-policy admission.
- SoraCloud ciphertext-native state model (`crates/iroha_data_model/src/soracloud.rs`, `crates/iroha_data_model/tests/soracloud_manifest_fixtures.rs`, `fixtures/soracloud/{secret_envelope_v1,ciphertext_state_record_v1}.json`, `docs/source/soracloud/manifest_schemas.md`, `roadmap.md`): added `SecretEnvelopeV1` (encrypted payload, key id/version, nonce, ciphertext, commitments) and `CiphertextStateRecordV1` (public metadata + secret payload binding) with deterministic validation for key path format, metadata-tag hygiene, nonce/ciphertext size bounds, and metadata/envelope consistency (`payload_bytes` + `commitment` equality checks).
- SoraCloud FHE/secret fixture and regression coverage (`crates/iroha_data_model/src/soracloud.rs`, `crates/iroha_data_model/tests/soracloud_manifest_fixtures.rs`): added unit regressions for empty modulus chain, lifecycle ordering, policy fan-out overflow, withdrawn-params rejection, positive governance-bundle admission, empty secret ciphertext rejection, and ciphertext-state payload mismatch rejection; extended fixture suite with canonical JSON + Norito roundtrips for `fhe_param_set_v1`, `fhe_execution_policy_v1`, `fhe_governance_bundle_v1`, `secret_envelope_v1`, and `ciphertext_state_record_v1`.
- SoraCloud deterministic FHE job admission/execution path (`crates/iroha_data_model/src/soracloud.rs`, `crates/iroha_data_model/tests/soracloud_manifest_fixtures.rs`, `fixtures/soracloud/fhe_job_spec_v1.json`, `crates/iroha_torii/src/{soracloud.rs,lib.rs}`, `roadmap.md`): added `FheJobSpecV1`/`FheJobInputRefV1`/`FheJobOperationV1` schema validation, deterministic output-size + output-commitment derivation, policy/parameter execution admission checks, canonical fixture coverage, and signed runtime execution endpoint `POST /v1/soracloud/fhe/job/run`. Torii runtime now enforces FHE-binding encryption class, mutability/prefix rules, per-binding quota accounting, and append-only semantics while emitting auditable `FheJobRun` registry events.
- Tests: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_data_model/src/soracloud.rs crates/iroha_data_model/tests/soracloud_manifest_fixtures.rs crates/iroha_torii/src/soracloud.rs crates/iroha_torii/src/lib.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_fhe cargo test -p iroha_data_model --test soracloud_manifest_fixtures regenerate_soracloud_fixtures -- --ignored --nocapture` (ok; 1 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_fhe cargo test -p iroha_data_model --lib soracloud::tests:: -- --nocapture` (ok; 28 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_fhe cargo test -p iroha_data_model --test soracloud_manifest_fixtures -- --nocapture` (ok; 15 passed, 1 ignored), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_fhe cargo test -p iroha_torii soracloud::tests:: -- --nocapture` (ok; 22 soracloud tests passed).
- SoraCloud AI apartment long-lived SCR execution persistence (`crates/iroha_torii/src/soracloud.rs`, `integration_tests/tests/iroha_cli.rs`, `docs/source/soracloud/cli_local_control_plane.md`, `roadmap.md`): completed in-node runtime continuity beyond control-plane metadata by persisting deterministic apartment process lifecycle fields (`process_generation`, `process_started_sequence`, `last_active_sequence`, `last_checkpoint_sequence`) plus autonomy checkpoint state accounting (`persistent_state_total_bytes`, `persistent_state_key_count`) under strict `manifest.state_quota_bytes` enforcement. Autonomy admission now computes deterministic checkpoint footprint and rejects runs that would overflow quota; runtime snapshots normalize forward-compatible defaults when loading older persistence records.
- SoraCloud AI apartment churn continuity validation (`crates/iroha_torii/src/soracloud.rs`, `integration_tests/tests/iroha_cli.rs`): added unit regression `agent_autonomy_checkpoint_rejects_when_state_quota_is_exceeded` and extended persistence/churn flows to assert checkpoint + process-generation continuity across registry reloads and live peer restart + apartment restart (`soracloud_agent_runtime_state_recovers_after_peer_restart_live_torii_control_plane`).
- Tests: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_torii/src/soracloud.rs integration_tests/tests/iroha_cli.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_exec_persistence cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib soracloud::tests::agent_ -- --nocapture` (ok; 6 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_soracloud_exec_persistence cargo test -p integration_tests --test iroha_cli soracloud_agent_runtime_state_recovers_after_peer_restart_live_torii_control_plane -- --nocapture` (ok; 1 passed, finished in `1120.92s`).
- Confidential localnet startup retry hardening (`integration_tests/tests/zk_confidential_localnet.rs`): added bounded bootstrap retries in `start_confidential_localnet` (`START_ATTEMPTS=3`) with transient-startup classification (`is_transient_localnet_startup_error`) to absorb sporadic `peer terminated within 5s post-genesis window` / connection-refused startup races seen in `zk_confidential_localnet`. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 integration_tests/tests/zk_confidential_localnet.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_zk_conf_localnet_fast NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=/Users/takemiyamakoto/dev/iroha/target/debug/iroha3d IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PARALLELISM=16 cargo test -p integration_tests --test zk_confidential_localnet -- --test-threads=1 confidential_unshield_rejected_without_zk_registration` (ok, `15.97s`), and full suite rerun `... cargo test -p integration_tests --test zk_confidential_localnet -- --test-threads=1` (ok, `17 passed`, `518.60s`).
- Nexus cross-dataspace soak stability and runtime registration attribution follow-up (`integration_tests/tests/nexus/cross_dataspace_localnet.rs`, `integration_tests/tests/nexus/runtime_dataspace_registration_perf.rs`): tightened soak resilience by increasing `SOAK_PHASE_WAIT_TIMEOUT` to `32s` and `SOAK_ITERATION_ATTEMPTS` to `3`, then completed a wider 5x5 rerun matrix. Cross-dataspace matrix (`/tmp/iroha_gapfill_matrix/cross_dataspace_matrix.csv`) passed all `5/5` runs with strict soak `10/10` every run, `soak_fallbacks` in `[3..8]`, `soak_retries=0`, and `swap_nonconverged_fallbacks=0`. Runtime matrix (`/tmp/iroha_gapfill_matrix/runtime_registration_matrix.csv`) passed all `5/5` runs with `pass_rate=100.0%` and submitter/cluster height-delta max `0` in every run; code-path inspection confirms this is expected because `/v1/nexus/lifecycle` applies lane lifecycle through control-plane state mutation (`crates/iroha_torii/src/routing.rs`) rather than consensus block inclusion. Validation commands: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod cross_dataspace_atomic_swap_is_all_or_nothing -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` and `... cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod runtime_nexus_registration_reports_lane_lifecycle_costs -- --nocapture --test-threads=1`. Remaining non-functional variance: occasional in-run rebuild/startup overhead can inflate wall-clock durations during repeated `cargo test` loops.
- Confidential localnet ZkNative transparent-mint behavior capture (`integration_tests/tests/zk_confidential_localnet.rs`): replaced the rejection assumption with `confidential_zknative_transparent_mint_creates_public_balance_localnet`, documenting observed localnet behavior that transparent `Mint` after `RegisterZkAsset(mode=ZkNative)` creates a public balance for the source account. - Nexus autoscale localnet repeated-cycle status-gap follow-up (`integration_tests/tests/nexus/autoscale_localnet.rs`): added lane-validator lifecycle status signals (`/v1/nexus/public_lanes/{lane}/validators`) into peer snapshots and expansion transition detection (`LaneValidatorSnapshot` with `active`, `pending_activation`, and activation metadata), added new unit coverage (`expansion_accepts_lane_validator_transition_on_quorum_peers`), added compact fallback signal diagnostics (`ExpansionSignalBreakdown`), and intensified probe-window load after storage grace (`EXPANSION_POST_STORAGE_TOP_UP_TX_COUNT=16`) to try to induce lane-activity status before storage fallback. - Testus remaining-gap closure for public localnet churn/load harness (`integration_tests/tests/testus_public_localnet.rs`): implemented the remaining stability gates by (1) adding hard lag-cycle threshold enforcement (`IROHA_TESTUS_MAX_LAGGED_CYCLE_RATIO`, default `0.35`) for process and membership churn, (2) replacing the fixed 120s churn cutoff with an adaptive settle window so short simulations still execute churn (`effective_final_settle_window` + `initial_churn_delay`), with explicit assertions that process churn and join/leave churn each run when enabled, (3) adding committed/finalized TPS gating using validator-min `txs_approved` deltas (`IROHA_TESTUS_MIN_COMMITTED_TPS_RATIO`, default `0.6`) and summary fields `committed_tps`/`committed_txs_min_delta`, (4) enforcing strict all-validator final convergence after quorum convergence, and (5) adding an absolute transient skew cap (`IROHA_TESTUS_MAX_TRANSIENT_HEIGHT_SKEW`, default `10`) alongside the existing recovery-aware skew rule. Added helper/unit coverage for the new settle-window/churn-delay/lag-threshold/approved-tx helpers. - Nexus autoscale localnet strict-transition follow-up (`integration_tests/tests/nexus/autoscale_localnet.rs`): replaced fixed expansion quorum assumptions with dynamic commit-quorum discovery and bounded status retries, expanded lane-status snapshots (`capacity` + `committed`) and storage provisioning checks, and added per-cycle activity gating so repeated cycles require real chain progress before completion. Also added deterministic load uniqueness (`LOAD_TX_SEQUENCE`) to prevent cycle-to-cycle replay no-op submissions, plus new unit coverage for storage expansion semantics. - Nexus cross-dataspace strict-soak gap closure follow-up (`integration_tests/tests/nexus/cross_dataspace_localnet.rs`): hardened remaining flaky paths after multi-run validation by (1) increasing setup retry budget and adding barrier-timeout query fallback for `register+mint`, (2) adding per-iteration soak retry budget (`SOAK_ITERATION_ATTEMPTS=2`) plus higher soak timeouts, (3) classifying rollback `"transaction queued for too long"` as inconclusive so rejection-reason fallback executes instead of tripping strict message assertions, and (4) deferring successful/reverse swap fallback barrier-timeout failures to the authoritative balance-assert phase (no premature abort on intermediate height barrier timeout). Health metrics now include `soak_retries`. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 integration_tests/tests/nexus/cross_dataspace_localnet.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling/debug/irohad KAGAMI_BIN=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling/debug/kagami IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PERMIT_DIR=$(mktemp -d) cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod cross_dataspace_atomic_swap_is_all_or_nothing -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (ok, `287.01s`; soak `10/10`, health `setup_retries=0 swap_fallbacks=1 soak_fallbacks=10 soak_retries=0`, phase total `286.910s`) and `... cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod runtime_nexus_registration_reports_lane_lifecycle_costs -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (ok, `15.80s`; submit `110.520/115.614/119.281ms`, commit/apply `3.853/4.269/5.188ms`, visibility `6.067/6.603/7.749ms`, total `121.064/126.486/132.115ms`, pass_rate `100.0%`). Additional sweep evidence gathered during hardening: pre-fix 3-run sweep surfaced rollback `"transaction queued for too long"` misclassification and a separate successful-swap fallback barrier timeout; both are addressed by this update.

- Testus churn backoff + lag telemetry hardening (`integration_tests/tests/testus_public_localnet.rs`): added lag-aware churn pacing so interim convergence lag does not immediately chain into the next churn cycle. `process_churn_cycle`, `membership_join_cycle`, and `membership_leave_cycle` now surface lag state; the loop schedules next churn with `next_churn_deadline(...)` and applies deterministic backoff (`INTERIM_LAG_CHURN_BACKOFF_SECS=30`) when lag is observed. `SimulationSummary` now reports `process_churn_lagged_cycles` and `membership_churn_lagged_cycles`, and helper coverage was added (`next_churn_deadline_uses_interval_without_lag`, `next_churn_deadline_adds_backoff_when_lagged`). - Nexus cross-dataspace setup/swap stabilization + soak fallback recovery (`integration_tests/tests/nexus/cross_dataspace_localnet.rs`): kept 12-peer topology and both ds1/ds2 explicit route probes, but hardened transaction flow by (1) keeping setup phases pipelined with single height barriers and a bounded retry budget for `register+mint` convergence (`SETUP_REGISTER_MINT_ATTEMPTS=2`, `SETUP_REGISTER_MINT_QUERY_TIMEOUT=20s`), (2) switching correctness-critical forward/reverse swaps to blocking submission with bounded timeout and inconclusive fallback to committed-outcome/height barrier checks, (3) using stable observer clients for tick-assist traffic instead of leader-targeted tick submitters, and (4) fixing soak fallback height targeting to sample pre-submit height plus a secondary committed-outcome check when height fallback times out. Result: `cross_dataspace_atomic_swap_is_all_or_nothing` now reruns green with improved end-to-end timing and recovered soak reliability. Validation: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling/debug/irohad KAGAMI_BIN=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling/debug/kagami IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PERMIT_DIR=$(mktemp -d) cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod cross_dataspace_atomic_swap_is_all_or_nothing -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (pass, `260.70s`; soak `iterations=10 pass_rate=100.0%`; phase total `260.630s`) and `... cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod runtime_nexus_registration_reports_lane_lifecycle_costs -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (pass, `13.46s`; submit `92.540/99.826/104.853ms`, commit/apply `1.746/1.799/1.848ms`, visibility `2.708/2.746/2.792ms`, total `97.165/104.372/109.414ms`, pass_rate `100.0%`).

- Nexus cross-dataspace tx-outcome confirmation + hybrid soak fallback hardening (`integration_tests/tests/nexus/cross_dataspace_localnet.rs`): setup grants and successful/reverse swaps now submit prebuilt transactions and wait on committed entrypoint outcomes (tx-specific confirmation) before strict state assertions, keeping enqueue/query phases short and avoiding height-only proxy confirms. Soak paired-swap confirmation now uses committed-outcome checks first and automatically falls back to the prior height-tick barrier when outcome lookup is inconclusive (`[soak] committed outcome inconclusive; falling back to height barrier`), improving report-only soak stability under load. Rollback rejection recovery remains bounded-first (`ROLLBACK_CAPPED_ATTEMPTS=2`, `BLOCKING_CONFIRMATION_TIMEOUT=20s`) with committed-history reason lookup (`ROLLBACK_HISTORY_RETRY_TIMEOUT=4s`, `ROLLBACK_HISTORY_FALLBACK_TIMEOUT=25s`) and now has a final uncapped blocking submit only as a last resort when history lookup itself is inconclusive, preserving strict `requires 10000` reason checks plus rollback balance invariants. Validation: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling/debug/irohad KAGAMI_BIN=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling/debug/kagami IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PERMIT_DIR=$(mktemp -d) cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod cross_dataspace_atomic_swap_is_all_or_nothing -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (pass, `394.26s`; soak pass_rate `100.0%`; rollback phase `19.881s`; total phase runtime `394.180s`) and `... cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod runtime_nexus_registration_reports_lane_lifecycle_costs -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (pass, `14.62s`; submit `142.547/167.024/198.926ms`; commit/apply `3.593/11.941/21.762ms`; visibility `3.955/12.103/26.960ms`; total `173.100/191.068/211.954ms`; pass_rate `100.0%`).

- Nexus cross-dataspace barrierized swaps + bounded rollback-history fallback (`integration_tests/tests/nexus/cross_dataspace_localnet.rs`): setup grants and successful/reverse swaps now use enqueue + explicit height barrier + strict query assertions (instead of capped blocking submit confirmations), while the failing underfunded rollback path keeps bounded blocking retries (`ROLLBACK_CAPPED_ATTEMPTS=2`, `BLOCKING_CONFIRMATION_TIMEOUT=20s`) and now resolves rejection reason from committed transaction history with bounded waits (`ROLLBACK_HISTORY_RETRY_TIMEOUT=4s`, `ROLLBACK_HISTORY_FALLBACK_TIMEOUT=25s`) rather than issuing a final uncapped blocking submit. Added detailed committed-rejection rendering (`Display + Debug`) so the strict `requires 10000` assertion remains reliable.
