- Nexus autoscale localnet deterministic scale-out tuning (`integration_tests/tests/nexus/autoscale_localnet.rs`): kept `LOAD_TX_COUNT=48` and heartbeat-driven expansion probing, but hardened the profile for slow-start localnet runs by (1) using deterministic top-up/reinforcement bursts during expansion wait (`16 tx` every 10 heartbeats, `32 tx` every 30 heartbeats) and (2) lowering autoscale latency gates in the test config (`scale_out_latency_ratio=0.2`, `scale_in_latency_ratio=0.15`, `scale_out_window_blocks=2`) so expansion is triggered by sustained load instead of rare high-latency tails. Updated helper/unit coverage accordingly (`expansion_top_up_profile_is_deterministic`, `expansion_observed_when_minimum_peers_converge`). Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 integration_tests/tests/nexus/autoscale_localnet.rs` (ok), `NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/codex-test KAGAMI_BIN=$PWD/target/debug/kagami TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=$PWD/target/debug/irohad IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod nexus::autoscale_localnet::tests:: -- --nocapture` (ok, 2 passed), and clean skip-build stress sweep `... cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod nexus::autoscale_localnet::nexus_autoscale_expands_and_contracts_lanes_in_localnet -- --nocapture` looped 10x (log: `/tmp/autoscale_finalcfg_10run_20260221T145529.log`) with `10/10` pass; startup min/avg/max `16.625/26.078/39.666s`, expansion `5.111/17.019/44.460s`, total runtime `26.407/43.580/72.890s`.
- Nexus cross-dataspace blocking-confirmation cap + rollback reason fallback (`integration_tests/tests/nexus/cross_dataspace_localnet.rs`): introduced a bounded confirmation timeout (`BLOCKING_CONFIRMATION_TIMEOUT=20s`) not only for correctness-path swaps but also for setup grants (with existing permission-visibility assertion as the authoritative success check), and classified timeout-class blocking failures as inconclusive where strict post-submit state assertions remain in place. For failing underfunded rollback, capped retries are limited to `ROLLBACK_CAPPED_ATTEMPTS=2` on fresh leader-targeted submitters, then one final uncapped blocking fallback is used only if both capped attempts are inconclusive, preserving strict rejection-reason assertion (`requires 10000`) and rollback-balance invariants. Validation: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling/debug/irohad KAGAMI_BIN=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling/debug/kagami IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PERMIT_DIR=$(mktemp -d) cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod cross_dataspace_atomic_swap_is_all_or_nothing -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (ok across reruns; latest pass `377.68s`; setup-grants confirm phase capped to `20.839s` on inconclusive confirmation; rollback recovered reason via final uncapped fallback after two capped attempts; soak remains report-only with pass_rate `50.0%` in this run) and `... cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod runtime_nexus_registration_reports_lane_lifecycle_costs -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (ok; pass_rate `100.0%`; submit `199.929ms/1.027s/3.574s`; commit/apply `3.696/14.165/33.995ms`; visibility `2.861/24.075/68.907ms`; total `272.532ms/1.066s/3.630s`).

- Low-load consensus liveness fix-plan implementation landed across config/core/status/torii/block-sync (`crates/iroha_config/src/parameters/{defaults.rs,user.rs,actual.rs}`, `crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop{.rs,/proposal_handlers.rs,/mode.rs,/qc.rs,/votes.rs,/tests.rs}`, `crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/status.rs`, `crates/iroha_core/src/block_sync.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/src/routing.rs`): added bounded missing-QC proposal-liveness state transitions (`Normal`/`AwaitingProposalAfterMissingQc`/`RecoveryAcquireDependencies`), leader forced-proposal watchdog with per-view budget, deterministic missing-QC dependency reacquire defer/rotate behavior, one-shot no-roster refresh-retry budgeting, deterministic unknown-prev block-sync fallback anchors, and new status counters (`consensus_forced_proposal_attempt_total`, `consensus_forced_proposal_success_total`, `consensus_missing_qc_reacquire_exhausted_total`, `consensus_missing_qc_rotation_deferred_total`, `consensus_no_roster_refresh_retry_total`, plus related recovery counters). - Implemented the next Izanami consensus/recovery tuning plan for the canonical 3600s soak path (`crates/izanami/src/chaos.rs`, `crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop{.rs,/qc.rs,/tests.rs}`): reduced RBC per-tick rebroadcast/chunk budgets, widened pacemaker backlog soft-limits, lowered NPoS block/commit times to `400ms/600ms`, and wired deterministic recovery overrides in Izanami config (`height_attempt_cap=24`, `height_window_ms=1500`, `hash_miss_cap_before_range_pull=2`, retry backoff multiplier/cap, signer fallback attempts, range-pull escalation threshold). Added strict progress safety gate in Izanami (`quorum min - strict min` divergence >2 blocks sustained for 30s now fails the soak early) to catch latent consensus skew before silent throughput stalls. In core recovery logic, missing-block retry backoff now compounds by attempt count (capped), and height recovery escalates to range-pull on attempt streaks before hard-cap view-change. Validation: `cargo fmt --all` (ok), `cargo test -p izanami make_network_builder_applies_pipeline_time -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p izanami divergence_state_ -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p izanami make_network_builder_forwards_rust_log_and_sets_peer_base_level -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p izanami run_with_queue_timeout_retry -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_core retry_missing_block_requests_backoff_scales_with_attempts_and_caps -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_core missing_block_attempt_streak_escalates_to_range_pull_before_hard_cap -- --nocapture` (ok).
- Izanami canonical 3600s soak rerun after recovery changes (`/tmp/izanami_soak_20260221T173428_postplan.log`, network dir `/var/folders/n2/xxntlr312qbfdnp0j1xp52hw0000gn/T/irohad_test_network_exjbWe`): reran `RUST_LOG=izanami::summary=info,izanami::workload=warn IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_KEEP_DIRS=1 IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PERMIT_DIR=$(mktemp -d) IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PARALLELISM=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_izanami_longrun cargo run -p izanami --release --locked -- --allow-net --nexus --peers 4 --faulty 0 --duration 3600s --target-blocks 2000 --progress-interval 10s --progress-timeout 300s --tps 5 --max-inflight 8 --workload-profile stable`. The height-279 no-progress stall did not recur: peers stayed converged and reached max height `1452` over `2026-02-21T13:38:54Z..14:39:02Z` with zero peer stderr output. Izanami summary improved to `successes=6685 failures=0 expected_failures=0 unexpected_successes=0 izanami_ingress_failover_total=4 izanami_ingress_endpoint_unhealthy_total=0` but run still exited with `izanami run stopped before target blocks reached` (`crates/izanami/src/chaos.rs:1297`) because `target-blocks=2000` was not reached in-duration. Artifact sizes: Izanami log `2.8K`; peer stdout logs `44.9M`, `45.7M`, `37.4M`, `43.0M` (stderr all `0B`, total `170.9M`). Dominant log-volume lines were `block sync sampling peers for latest blocks` (`42585`), `accepted RBC READY` (`11132`), and `sending RBC chunks to missing-block requester` (`10031`).
- Izanami peer log-volume mitigation (`crates/izanami/src/chaos.rs`): fixed peer logger forwarding so `RUST_LOG` no longer inherits a default global INFO base from node config. `make_network_builder` now sets `logger.level=WARN` while forwarding `logger.filter`, preserving targeted debug directives and suppressing broad INFO flood in long soaks. Added/updated test `make_network_builder_forwards_rust_log_and_sets_peer_base_level`; validation: `cargo test -p izanami make_network_builder_forwards_rust_log_and_sets_peer_base_level -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p izanami run_with_queue_timeout_retry -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo fmt --all` (ok). Follow-up short soak verification (`/tmp/izanami_soak_20260221T184438_peerlogcheck.log`, network dir `/var/folders/n2/xxntlr312qbfdnp0j1xp52hw0000gn/T/irohad_test_network_OytBBJ`, `--duration 120s --target-blocks 100`) produced peer stdout logs of only `1221`, `1217`, `1217`, and `1806` bytes (stderr all `0B`) under `RUST_LOG=izanami::summary=info,izanami::workload=warn`; run ended with expected target-not-reached error (`successes=343`, `failures=0`).
- Izanami canonical 3600s soak rerun (`/tmp/izanami_soak_20260221T162808.log`, network dir `/var/folders/n2/xxntlr312qbfdnp0j1xp52hw0000gn/T/irohad_test_network_A3GUVp`): reran the canonical command `RUST_LOG=izanami::summary=info,izanami::workload=warn IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_KEEP_DIRS=1 IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PERMIT_DIR=$(mktemp -d) IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PARALLELISM=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_izanami_longrun cargo run -p izanami --release --locked -- --allow-net --nexus --peers 4 --faulty 0 --duration 3600s --target-blocks 2000 --progress-interval 10s --progress-timeout 300s --tps 5 --max-inflight 8 --workload-profile stable` and it failed with `no block height progress for 300s (quorum min height 279, strict min 279, target 2000, tolerated_failures 1)` from `crates/izanami/src/chaos.rs:1334` (exit code 1). Izanami emitted terminal summary on failure (`izanami run finished with errors successes=1228 failures=16 expected_failures=0 unexpected_successes=0 izanami_ingress_failover_total=95 izanami_ingress_endpoint_unhealthy_total=65`). During the stall window, workload warnings repeatedly reported `transaction queued for too long` and 20s status confirmation timeouts. Peer commits converged and then froze at height 279 (`enthralled_steenbok/perfect_boatbill/expressive_rat/spiritual_human` last commit around `2026-02-21T12:46:12Z..12:46:13Z`), then all peers exited cleanly with empty stderr. Artifact sizes: Izanami log `43K`; peer stdout logs `8.9M`, `7.2M`, `7.1M`, `8.7M` (stderr all `0B`).
- Consensus recovery + Izanami soak follow-up (`crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop/{qc.rs,tests.rs}`, `crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop.rs`, `crates/izanami/src/chaos.rs`, `crates/iroha_config/src/parameters/{defaults.rs,actual.rs,user.rs}`, `crates/iroha_torii/tests/connect_gating.rs`): added deterministic missing-block retry backoff controls (`sumeragi.recovery.missing_block_retry_backoff_multiplier`, `missing_block_retry_backoff_cap_ms`) and wired effective-window gating in QC retry scheduling, added Izanami queue-timeout retry wrapping for plan submission (`transaction queued for too long` now follows bounded retry policy), and ensured Izanami run teardown always emits terminal summary/error metrics with fast-failure worker shutdown timeout. Closed the final torii compile blocker by completing config struct initializers in `connect_gating.rs` for new network/sumeragi fields. Validation: `cargo fmt --all` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_config` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_core --lib retry_missing_block_requests_applies_configured_backoff_before_retrying -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p izanami run_with_queue_timeout_retry -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p izanami ingress_failover_marks_queue_timeout_retryable -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --tests --no-run` (ok).
- Offline petal distance-safe stress-gate + realtime validation follow-up (`crates/iroha_cli/src/offline/petal.rs`): kept fail-fast capture-gate plumbing (`planned_attempts` denominator + `aborted_early`), added adaptive low-light katakana marker thresholding, and hardened katakana decoding so binary sampler misses no longer hard-fail symbol-state extraction. Updated realtime katakana simulation tests to validate at the distance-safe quality dimension (`1024`). Capture eval default gate remains passing (`artifacts/petal_real_katakana_distance_safe_v3_capture_default_t1_report.json`, `success_ratio=0.9512195121951219`, `stream_complete=true`); aggressive profile still fail-fasts (`artifacts/petal_real_katakana_distance_safe_v3_capture_aggressive_t1_v2_report.json`, `attempts=6/41`, `aborted_early=true`, `success_ratio=0.07317073170731707`).
- Root-cause stabilization plan implementation (`crates/iroha_config/src/parameters/{actual.rs,defaults.rs,user.rs}`, `crates/iroha_config/tests/fixtures.rs`, `crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop{.rs,/commit.rs,/mode.rs,/reschedule.rs,/votes.rs,/tests.rs}`, `crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/{status.rs,penalties.rs}`, `crates/iroha_core/src/kiso.rs`, `crates/izanami/src/chaos.rs`): completed deterministic recovery/fanout and ingress failover sweep by (1) simplifying Sumeragi recovery/fanout config knobs with legacy mapping in user config parsing, (2) enforcing bounded no-roster fallback with fail-closed escalation + per-height budget lifecycle, (3) wiring deterministic large-set fanout committee selection into transport fanout and status metrics, (4) adding Izanami endpoint-pool submission/query failover with cooldown/reprobe health tracking and failover counters, and (5) adding Sumeragi tick re-entrancy guard coverage. Also fixed a deterministic-fanout test harness edge case by deriving fallback multi-peer roster from harness keypairs when bootstrap topology is singleton. Validation: `cargo fmt --all` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-codex cargo check -p iroha_config -p iroha_core -p izanami` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-codex cargo test -p iroha_core actor_tick_skips_reentrant_invocation -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-codex cargo test -p iroha_core --lib no_roster_fallback_is_bounded_and_fail_closed_once_per_view -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-codex cargo test -p iroha_core --lib deterministic_fanout_committee_uses_formula_and_key_tiebreak -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-codex cargo test -p izanami endpoint_pool_ -- --nocapture` (ok; 3 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-codex cargo test -p iroha_config --test fixtures -- --nocapture` (ok; 59 passed).
- SoraCloud AI apartment lease-expiry recovery integration coverage (`integration_tests/tests/iroha_cli.rs`, `roadmap.md`): added end-to-end CLI integration test `soracloud_agent_lease_expiry_and_renew_recovery_local_flow` for local control-plane lease lifecycle: deploy with short lease (`--lease-ticks 1`), assert lease-expired policy rejection, renew lease with `agent-lease-renew`, and verify subsequent wallet policy action plus `agent-status` `Running` state with positive remaining lease ticks.
- SoraCloud AI apartment wallet + mailbox integration coverage (`integration_tests/tests/iroha_cli.rs`, `roadmap.md`): added end-to-end CLI integration test `soracloud_agent_wallet_and_mailbox_local_policy_flow` for local control-plane wallet/mailbox workflow: deploy sender/recipient apartments, wallet spend request + approval, policy revocation (`wallet.sign`) with post-revocation rejection, mailbox send/status/ack cycle, and empty-queue verification.
- SoraCloud AI apartment autonomy integration coverage (`integration_tests/tests/iroha_cli.rs`, `roadmap.md`): added end-to-end CLI integration test `soracloud_agent_autonomy_local_policy_flow` for local control-plane autonomy flow: `agent-deploy` with budget, `agent-artifact-allow` (with provenance pinning), `agent-autonomy-run` budget consumption, `agent-autonomy-status` state verification, and explicit rejection on budget overflow.

- SoraCloud AI apartment autonomy safety controls (`crates/iroha_cli/src/soracloud.rs`, `docs/source/soracloud/cli_local_control_plane.md`, `roadmap.md`): completed deterministic local autonomy guardrails with `agent-artifact-allow`, `agent-autonomy-run`, and `agent-autonomy-status`. Registry runtime now tracks per-apartment artifact allowlist rules, optional provenance pinning, autonomy budget ceiling/remaining counters, and autonomous run history; autonomous run approval enforces lease validity, active `agent.autonomy.run`, allowlist membership, optional provenance match, and budget sufficiency before recording append-only events (`ArtifactAllowed`/`AutonomyRunApproved`) with budget snapshots.

- SoraCloud AI apartment wallet/key local policy engine (`crates/iroha_cli/src/soracloud.rs`, `docs/source/soracloud/cli_local_control_plane.md`, `roadmap.md`): added deterministic CLI-local wallet guardrails for apartments via `agent-wallet-spend`, `agent-wallet-approve`, and `agent-policy-revoke`. Runtime policy now tracks revocations, pending wallet requests, and deterministic daily spend buckets (`sequence / 10_000`), enforcing active `wallet.sign`, optional `wallet.auto_approve`, per-asset `max_per_tx_nanos`, and per-day budget ceilings before approval.

- SoraCloud AI apartment local scheduler lifecycle (`crates/iroha_cli/src/soracloud.rs`, `docs/source/soracloud/cli_local_control_plane.md`, `roadmap.md`): completed deterministic local control-plane support for apartment manifests with new CLI commands `agent-deploy`, `agent-lease-renew`, `agent-restart`, and `agent-status`. Registry schema now persists `apartments` runtime state plus append-only `apartment_events`; lease windows are sequence-based and surface `LeaseExpired` status deterministically, lease renewal revives apartment runtime state, and restart records reason/sequence metadata for auditability.

- SoraCloud zero-downtime rollout primitives (`crates/iroha_torii/src/soracloud.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/src/lib.rs`, `crates/iroha_cli/src/soracloud.rs`, `integration_tests/tests/iroha_cli.rs`, `docs/source/soracloud/cli_local_control_plane.md`, `roadmap.md`): completed canary rollout controls for site/API bundles. Torii now serves signed `POST /v1/soracloud/rollout` with canary promotion, health-gate failure tracking, and automatic baseline rollback; status snapshots now surface `active_rollout`/`last_rollout`. CLI adds `iroha app soracloud rollout` with both local-registry and `--torii-url` execution paths, and local simulation now mirrors runtime rollout state transitions. To avoid cross-crate signature drift, rollout and rollback signatures now use canonical tuple payload encoding in both CLI and Torii verification paths. Integration flow `soracloud_mutations_use_live_torii_control_plane` now covers deploy -> upgrade -> rollout -> rollback and verifies the audit count increment.

- Nexus cross-dataspace blocking-confirmation cap + rollback reason fallback (`integration_tests/tests/nexus/cross_dataspace_localnet.rs`): introduced a bounded confirmation timeout for correctness-path swap submissions (`BLOCKING_CONFIRMATION_TIMEOUT=20s`) and classified timeout-class blocking failures as inconclusive for successful/reverse swap submission so the test can continue to strict balance convergence checks. For failing underfunded rollback, kept bounded retries on fresh leader-targeted submitters and added a final uncapped blocking fallback attempt only when all bounded attempts are inconclusive, preserving strict rejection-reason assertion (`requires 10000`) and rollback-balance invariants. Validation: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling/debug/irohad KAGAMI_BIN=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling/debug/kagami IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PERMIT_DIR=$(mktemp -d) cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod cross_dataspace_atomic_swap_is_all_or_nothing -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (ok; latest pass `463.08s`; successful/reverse swap submit+confirm phases each capped near `~21s` when inconclusive; rollback recovered reason via final uncapped fallback; soak remains report-only with pass_rate `40.0%` in this run) and `... cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod runtime_nexus_registration_reports_lane_lifecycle_costs -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (ok; pass_rate `100.0%`; submit `199.929ms/1.027s/3.574s`; commit/apply `3.696/14.165/33.995ms`; visibility `2.861/24.075/68.907ms`; total `272.532ms/1.066s/3.630s`).
- Nexus cross-dataspace execution resilience follow-up (`integration_tests/tests/nexus/cross_dataspace_localnet.rs`): hardened long-run polling paths against transient Torii/status timeouts by retrying in `wait_for_height*`, `wait_for_expected_balances*`, and `wait_for_account_permissions` until timeout budget exhaustion (capturing last query error in timeout diagnostics), kept strict queued-route probes with 100ms approval cap + fallback attribution, refreshed soak submitter selection per iteration, and restored correctness-critical forward/reverse swap steps to blocking confirmation to avoid false barrier progress. Rollback check now uses bounded blocking retries on fresh leader-targeted submitters (unique settlement IDs) when transient `Transaction submitter thread exited with error` occurs, while still asserting underfunded rejection text (`requires 10000`) and unchanged balances. Validation: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling NORITO_SKIP_BINDINGS_SYNC=1 IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling/debug/irohad KAGAMI_BIN=/tmp/iroha_target_cross_opt_rolling/debug/kagami IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PERMIT_DIR=$(mktemp -d) cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod cross_dataspace_atomic_swap_is_all_or_nothing -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (ok; latest pass `333.41s`; route-probe phase `0.499s`; soak report-only pass_rate `60.0%`; rollback rejection reason asserted, rollback balances preserved) and `... cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod runtime_nexus_registration_reports_lane_lifecycle_costs -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (ok; pass_rate `100.0%`; submit `109.550/180.774/237.117ms`; commit/apply `2.529/3.062/3.577ms`; all-peer visibility `4.509/8.408/20.920ms`; total `117.925/192.244/244.155ms`).
- Testus membership/convergence hardening (`integration_tests/tests/testus_public_localnet.rs`): extended churn stability handling so localnet soak runs stay resilient to transient Torii/query lag while preserving BFT safety checks. Key updates: membership propagation checks use validator-wide quorum semantics (`wait_for_peer_presence_across_clients` + `min_presence_matches`), final settle uses quorum convergence (`wait_for_cluster_convergence_quorum`), peer-presence queries now retry timeout-class failures (`PEER_QUERY_REQUEST_RETRIES=3`, `PEER_QUERY_REQUEST_RETRY_BACKOFF=200ms`), non-fatal interim convergence waits are bounded (`INTERIM_CONVERGENCE_TIMEOUT_SECS=45`), and leave-propagation lag is warning-only instead of aborting the test. - Confidential localnet shielding/unshielding coverage (`integration_tests/tests/zk_confidential_localnet.rs`): added a 4-peer integration test `confidential_public_and_shielded_three_hop_localnet` that exercises (1) public-origin shielding, three shielded hops, unshield, and public transfer to `BOB_ID`, and (2) a second asset registered for confidential use with three shielded hops. Added negative-path scenarios `confidential_unshield_rejected_when_disabled`, `confidential_shield_rejected_when_disabled`, `confidential_shield_rejected_without_zk_registration`, and `confidential_unshield_rejected_with_stale_root_hint` that cover `allow_unshield=false`, `allow_shield=false`, missing zk registration, and stale root-hint rejection; each denied operation is followed by chain progress and balance-invariant assertions. To reduce localnet pipeline-confirmation flakiness, submission broadcasts the same signed transaction across peer clients and waits for non-empty block progression before asserting balances. Added focused helper coverage for transient-network and duplicate-transaction classifier functions (`transient_client_error_detector_matches_expected_messages`, `transient_client_error_detector_ignores_non_transient_messages`, `duplicate_tx_error_detector_matches_expected_messages`, `duplicate_tx_error_detector_ignores_non_duplicate_messages`). Validation: `TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=target/debug/iroha3d IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PARALLELISM=16 cargo test -p integration_tests --test zk_confidential_localnet -- --test-threads=1 confidential_public_and_shielded_three_hop_localnet` (ok; initial pass `113.89s`; repeat stability loop 3/3 passes: `157.99s`, `128.70s`, `49.50s`), `... confidential_unshield_rejected_when_disabled` (ok; `35.30s`), `... confidential_shield_rejected_when_disabled` (ok; `69.88s`), `... confidential_shield_rejected_without_zk_registration` (ok; `35.66s`), `... confidential_unshield_rejected_with_stale_root_hint` (ok; `44.32s`), and `TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=target/debug/iroha3d IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PARALLELISM=16 cargo test -p integration_tests --test zk_confidential_localnet -- --test-threads=1` (ok; full suite now `9 passed`, `224.98s`; prior full-suite runs with `8 passed` in `216.80s`, `7 passed` in `106.42s`, and `6 passed` in `167.71s`/`175.38s`). Compile guard: `cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod --no-run` (ok; latest `2m 42s`; prior `1m 03s`/`4m 21s`).
- Testus status-timeout resilience follow-up (`integration_tests/tests/testus_public_localnet.rs`): hardened validator status sampling by retrying timeout-class `/status` calls in `collect_statuses` (`STATUS_REQUEST_RETRIES=3`, `STATUS_REQUEST_RETRY_BACKOFF=200ms`) via new helper `get_status_with_retry`, preventing transient Torii timeout spikes during churn from aborting the simulation loop. Added focused unit coverage for timeout classification (`http_timeout_error_detector_matches_timeout_messages`, `http_timeout_error_detector_ignores_non_timeout_messages`).
