- ZK audit remediation implementation (2026-02-19): implemented the planned security/performance hardening across ZK surfaces. `crates/iroha_torii/src/zk_prover.rs` now sanitizes report IDs on save/load/delete/list, rejects invalid report IDs at app API edges, bounds report scans (`REPORT_SCAN_MAX_FILES`), and tightens background scan scheduling by enforcing `max_inflight` joins before spawn and acquiring semaphore permits prior to task spawn; added regressions `get_report_rejects_invalid_id` and `delete_report_rejects_invalid_id`. `crates/iroha_torii/src/zk_attachments.rs` now stores ingest-time ZK1 tag indexes (`AttachmentMeta.zk1_tags`), uses bounded legacy body scanning fallback for tag filters (`TAG_FILTER_LEGACY_SCAN_CAP`), and adds `zk1_extract_tags_collects_tlv_tags`. `crates/ivm/src/zk.rs` now deterministically rejects cross-chunk memory replay writes in `verify_trace` (new test `verify_trace_rejects_cross_chunk_memory_writes`). `crates/iroha_data_model/src/proof.rs` now applies explicit caps to len-prefixed decode fields and rejects over-cap payloads (new tests `take_len_prefixed_slice_rejects_fields_beyond_cap`, `proofbox_decode_rejects_oversized_len_prefixed_payloads`). `crates/iroha_zkp_halo2/src/lib.rs` now caches limited Rayon pools for batch verification to avoid per-call pool rebuild overhead. Validation: `cargo fmt --all -- --check` (ok), `cargo test -p ivm verify_trace_rejects_cross_chunk_memory_writes -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_torii get_report_rejects_invalid_id -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib delete_report_rejects_invalid_id -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib zk1_extract_tags_collects_tlv_tags -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_data_model take_len_prefixed_slice_rejects_fields_beyond_cap -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_data_model proofbox_decode_rejects_oversized_len_prefixed_payloads -- --nocapture` (ok).
- Kura/WSV hardening implementation (2026-02-19): implemented Phase 1 and part of Phase 2 from `docs/source/kura_wsv_security_performance_audit_20260219.md`. In `crates/iroha_core/src/kura.rs`, replaced writer-thread panic-on-IO behavior with fault recording and graceful writer shutdown (`Error::BlockWriterFaulted` surfaced from enqueue/replace paths), added pending-budget byte caching/incremental updates on enqueue/persist, and added regressions `store_block_reports_writer_fault` and `replace_top_block_reports_writer_fault`. In `crates/iroha_core/src/state.rs`, `apply_without_execution` no longer panics on DA cursor advancement failures and now records/logs errors without aborting block apply. In `crates/ivm/src/mock_wsv.rs`, added envelope-size bounds for `SYSCALL_INPUT_PUBLISH_TLV` and JSON instruction envelopes, introduced explicit admin alias permissions (`ManageRoles`, `ManagePermissions`, `ManageTriggers`, `ManagePeers`), and added regression coverage in both unit/integration tests. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_core/src/kura.rs crates/iroha_core/src/state.rs crates/ivm/src/mock_wsv.rs crates/ivm/tests/wsv_host_roles_triggers_envelope.rs crates/ivm/tests/wsv_host_execute_query_envelope.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_kura_wsv_harden cargo test -p iroha_core --lib store_block_reports_writer_fault -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_kura_wsv_harden cargo test -p iroha_core --lib replace_top_block_reports_writer_fault -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_kura_wsv_harden cargo test -p iroha_core --lib apply_without_execution_persists_da_shard_cursor_journal_in_background -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_kura_wsv_harden cargo test -p ivm --test wsv_host_roles_triggers_envelope -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_kura_wsv_harden cargo test -p ivm --test wsv_host_execute_query_envelope -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_kura_wsv_harden cargo test -p ivm --lib input_publish_tlv_rejects_oversized_envelope -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_kura_wsv_harden cargo test -p ivm --lib execute_instruction_rejects_oversized_json_envelope -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_kura_wsv_harden cargo test -p ivm --lib parse_manage_permissions_variants_ok -- --nocapture` (ok).
- Kura/WSV security-performance audit (`docs/source/kura_wsv_security_performance_audit_20260219.md`): completed an exhaustive review across `crates/iroha_core/src/kura.rs`, production WSV paths in `crates/iroha_core/src/state.rs`, and IVM mock-host WSV surfaces in `crates/ivm/src/mock_wsv.rs`. High-priority findings: Kura writer panic-on-IO paths (`kura.rs:1697`, `1724`, `1845`, `1854`, `1860`), lock-heavy full-file eviction rewrites (`kura.rs:834`, `921`, `942`, `956`), and long coarse `view_lock` hold windows during block commit (`state.rs:17456`, `17466`, `17483`); plus test/dev host hardening gaps in JSON admin aliases and envelope size bounds (`mock_wsv.rs:4274`, `4371`, `4448`, `3750`, `3755`). No source logic changes were applied in this audit step; this update records prioritized remediation and test additions.
- Offline settlement atomicity hardening (`crates/iroha_core/src/smartcontracts/isi/offline.rs`): fixed `SubmitOfflineToOnlineTransfer` so allowance mutation (`remaining_amount`, commitment, counter state) and transfer-record insertion happen only after `credit_deposit_account` succeeds, preventing failed escrow credit from decrementing offline allowance state. Hardened `credit_deposit_account` with destination-account preflight checks and escrow refund-on-deposit-failure protection, and made post-credit settlement writes infallible (precomputed `receipt_count`, infallible transfer-event emission/record insertion after prevalidation) to avoid partial post-credit rejection paths. Added regressions `submit_transfer_rejects_insufficient_escrow_without_mutating_allowance_or_credit` and `credit_deposit_account_rejects_missing_deposit_without_escrow_debit` to lock in no-debit/no-credit behavior across escrow shortfall and missing-deposit-account failures. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_core/src/smartcontracts/isi/offline.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p iroha_core --lib submit_transfer_rejects_insufficient_escrow_without_mutating_allowance_or_credit -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p iroha_core --lib submit_transfer_rejects_duplicate_bundle_without_mutating_allowance -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p iroha_core --lib submit_transfer_rejects_replayed_counter_without_credit -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p iroha_core --lib credit_deposit_account_rejects_insufficient_escrow_without_credit -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p iroha_core --lib credit_deposit_account_rejects_missing_deposit_without_escrow_debit -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p integration_tests --test offline_allowance_security -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (ok, 2 passed).
- Offline settlement spend-safety hardening (`crates/iroha_core/src/smartcontracts/isi/offline.rs`): added an early duplicate-bundle guard in `SubmitOfflineToOnlineTransfer` before proof/sig verification to prevent any settlement-path state mutation on replayed `bundle_id`s, and added regressions `submit_transfer_rejects_duplicate_bundle_without_mutating_allowance`, `submit_transfer_rejects_replayed_counter_without_credit`, and `credit_deposit_account_rejects_insufficient_escrow_without_credit` to enforce that rejected settlements cannot debit allowance state or credit receivers when escrow backing is missing or counters are replayed. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_core/src/smartcontracts/isi/offline.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p iroha_core --lib credit_deposit_account_rejects_insufficient_escrow_without_credit -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p iroha_core --lib submit_transfer_rejects_duplicate_bundle_without_mutating_allowance -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p iroha_core --lib submit_transfer_rejects_replayed_counter_without_credit -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p iroha_core --lib submit_transfer_rejects_revoked_verdict -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p iroha_core --lib submit_transfer_rejects_delta_mismatch -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p integration_tests --test offline_allowance_security -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (ok, 2 passed).
- Offline allowance security hardening follow-up (`crates/iroha_core/src/smartcontracts/isi/offline.rs`, `integration_tests/tests/offline_allowance_security.rs`, `integration_tests/tests/address_canonicalisation.rs`, `docs/source/offline_allowance.md`): `SubmitOfflineToOnlineTransfer` now hard-rejects bundles when the allowance `verdict_id` appears in `offline_verdict_revocations` (no settlement side effects), with unit regressions for revoked-verdict settlement rejection and register-time certificate window checks (`issued_at_in_future`, expired certificate, refresh-after-expiry). Added integration regressions for `unauthorized_controller` and `escrow_missing`; extended test certificate validity to avoid startup-time expiry flakes; and fixed offline allowance genesis helpers to pre-mint the controller asset so stricter register-time escrow/balance checks pass in address-format coverage. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_core/src/smartcontracts/isi/offline.rs integration_tests/tests/offline_allowance_security.rs integration_tests/tests/address_canonicalisation.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p iroha_core --lib refresh_after_expiry_is_rejected -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p iroha_core --lib register_allowance_rejects_future_certificate -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p iroha_core --lib register_allowance_rejects_expired_certificate -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p iroha_core --lib submit_transfer_rejects_revoked_verdict -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p integration_tests --test offline_allowance_security -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (ok, 2 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p integration_tests --test address_canonicalisation offline_allowances_ -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (ok, 2 passed).

- Izanami long-run soak (2026-02-18): `IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_KEEP_DIRS=1 IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PARALLELISM=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_izanami_longrun cargo run -p izanami --release --locked -- --allow-net --nexus --peers 4 --faulty 0 --duration 3600s --target-blocks 2000 --progress-interval 10s --progress-timeout 300s --tps 5 --max-inflight 8 --workload-profile stable` failed with `no block height progress for 300s (min height 1217, target 2000)`. Artifacts: run log `/tmp/izanami_soak_20260218T014355.log`, network dir `/var/folders/n2/xxntlr312qbfdnp0j1xp52hw0000gn/T/irohad_test_network_iGYwTs`.
- Soak bottleneck snapshot (same run): core lane heights diverged (`right_springbuck=1239`, `mature_greenshank=1239`, `organic_garpike=1239`, `conquering_mudfish=1217`), WARN skew shifted to `conquering_mudfish` (`warn=154`) with `Block hash not found; sharing from genesis=65`, `no proposal observed before cutoff=1`, `commit quorum missing past timeout; rescheduling block for reassembly=2`; other peers were dominated by `stake quorum observed but block payload missing; deferring QC aggregation` and `dropping block sync QC that conflicts with locked chain`.
- `iroha_core` block-sync follow-up (`crates/iroha_core/src/block_sync.rs`): unknown-`prev_hash` handling now derives a fallback start height from the requester-provided `latest_hash` when locally known (`unknown_prev_fallback_start_height`) and only falls back to genesis when that anchor is unavailable; logs now include `fallback_start_height`. This reduces repeated genesis-share churn when peers disagree on `prev_hash` but share a known anchor.
- Tests/validation for block-sync fallback anchor: added `unknown_prev_fallback_uses_known_latest_hash_height` and `unknown_prev_fallback_none_when_latest_hash_unknown` in `block_sync::unknown_prev_hash_tests`; reran `cargo test -p iroha_core --lib unknown_prev_fallback_ -- --nocapture` (2 passed), `cargo test -p iroha_core --lib should_share_unknown_prev_hash_tracks_peer_and_height -- --nocapture` (1 passed), and `cargo check -p iroha_core --lib` (ok).
- `iroha_core` tx validation performance follow-up (`crates/iroha_core/src/block.rs`): stateless-cache reuse now covers all static-validation entry paths (`validate`, `validate_with_events`, `validate_keep_voting_block_inner`, `validate_keep_voting_block_with_events`) by reading/writing `State::stateless_validation_cache` (`StatelessValidationContext`) and threading cache-hit snapshots into `validate_static_with_snapshot`, where static scheme preverification/per-tx validation skip cached transactions. Stateful validation still precomputes `routing_decisions` once and reuses them across fraud-policy stateless checks, telemetry, and apply phases. Added regression coverage `validate_populates_stateless_cache`, `validate_with_events_populates_stateless_cache`, and `validate_keep_voting_block_with_events_populates_stateless_cache` (plus existing keep-voting cache test). Validation: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_txval_perf cargo test -p iroha_core --lib populates_stateless_cache -- --nocapture` (ok, 4 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_txval_perf cargo test -p iroha_core --lib validate_and_record_transactions_skip_stateless_matches_full -- --nocapture` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_txval_perf cargo test -p iroha_core --lib validate_static_snapshot_rejects_invalid_signature -- --nocapture` (ok). Benchmark comparison (`cargo bench -p iroha_core --bench validation -- validate --noplot --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 3`): previous run `11.104 ┬Ąs .. 11.142 ┬Ąs`, current run `11.291 ┬Ąs .. 11.393 ┬Ąs` (Criterion reports `+1.53% .. +2.57%`, regression).

- `iroha_core` Sumeragi DA/RBC rebroadcast follow-up (`crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop.rs`, `crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop/tests.rs`): replaced per-tick full-session urgent sorting in `rebroadcast_stalled_rbc_payloads` with a bounded near-tip candidate selector sourced from inflight/pending block keys (still cursor-fair under session budgets), reducing selector overhead while keeping urgent-session prioritization. Added coverage `rebroadcast_stalled_rbc_payloads_prioritizes_urgent_near_tip_session` and revalidated the rebroadcast suite: `cargo test -p iroha_core --lib rebroadcast_stalled_rbc_payloads_ -- --nocapture` (11 passed). Izanami 4-peer 1h reruns (`--duration 3600s --target-blocks 2000 --tps 5 --max-inflight 8`) remained below target: run `irohad_test_network_qX5cOf` stopped at `min_height=981` (counts: payload-missing 49, no-proposal 6, commit-quorum-missing 5, block-sync-conflict 260) and post-selector run `irohad_test_network_3AgY53` stopped at `min_height=1151` (payload-missing 68, no-proposal 3, commit-quorum-missing 5, block-sync-conflict 261). Largest progress stalls were 20-30s (`h770->773`, `h953->956`, `h1083->1085`), so DA/RBC and block-sync conflict bottlenecks remain open.

- `iroha_torii` MCP ISO 20022 aliases (`crates/iroha_torii/src/mcp.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/docs/mcp_api.md`): added agent-facing ISO bridge tools `iroha.iso20022.pacs008.submit`, `iroha.iso20022.pacs009.submit`, and `iroha.iso20022.status.get` so agents can submit pacs.008/pacs.009 payloads and query message status without raw `torii.*` operation IDs. Added dispatch wiring to `/v1/iso20022/pacs008`, `/v1/iso20022/pacs009`, and `/v1/iso20022/status/{msg_id}`, with XML convenience shortcuts (`message_xml`/`xml`) for submit tools and message-id shortcuts (`msg_id`/`message_id`/`id`) for status lookup. Updated MCP docs alias inventory with ISO submit/status examples. - Torii/client queue rejection decoding + NPoS stress test de-flake (`crates/iroha_torii_shared/src/lib.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/src/lib.rs`, `crates/iroha/src/client.rs`, `integration_tests/tests/sumeragi_npos_performance.rs`): introduced shared Norito queue-rejection payload types (`QueueErrorEnvelope`, `QueueErrorSnapshot`) in `iroha_torii_shared` and switched Torii + client to those shared types so client-side `ResponseReport` can decode `429 PRTRY:QUEUE_FULL` Norito payloads instead of reporting "body isn't a valid utf-8 string". Added client/unit coverage (`with_msg_decodes_shared_queue_error_envelope`) and shared-type roundtrip coverage. Stabilized NPoS stress tests by using non-blocking submission for queue/RBC pressure scenarios, accounting for expected queue backpressure rejects, requiring pacemaker deferral in queue stress while recording (not requiring) RBC deferrals, and making RBC-store timeout handling non-fatal with explicit summary/warning telemetry (`timed_out`). Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha/src/client.rs crates/iroha_torii/src/lib.rs crates/iroha_torii_shared/src/lib.rs integration_tests/tests/sumeragi_npos_performance.rs` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_torii_shared queue_error_envelope_roundtrip_preserves_fields -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha with_msg_decodes_shared_queue_error_envelope -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p integration_tests --test sumeragi_npos_performance npos_queue_backpressure_triggers_metrics -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p integration_tests --test sumeragi_npos_performance npos_rbc_store_backpressure_records_metrics -- --nocapture` (ok, warning path observed with zero-pressure snapshot + `timed_out=true` summary).
- Offline escrow invariant hardening (`crates/iroha_core/src/smartcontracts/isi/offline.rs`, `docs/source/offline_allowance.md`, `scripts/offline_topup/README.md`): changed offline allowance reserve and settlement credit paths to reject missing escrow bindings with `escrow_missing` even when `settlement.offline.escrow_required=false`, preventing unbacked allowance registration and settlement-side minting. Added regression coverage `register_allowance_fails_without_escrow_when_not_required_and_metadata_disabled_or_missing` and `credit_deposit_account_rejects_missing_escrow_when_not_required`, and updated offline docs/top-up helper guidance to require escrow binding for registration/settlement. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_core/src/smartcontracts/isi/offline.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p iroha_core --lib register_allowance_fails_without_escrow_when_not_required_and_metadata_disabled_or_missing -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_tmp_security_fix cargo test -p iroha_core --lib credit_deposit_account_rejects_missing_escrow_when_not_required -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed).
- Iroha Connect relay-traffic status integration (`crates/iroha_torii/tests/connect_gating.rs`, `javascript/iroha_js/test/toriiClient.test.js`, `docs/connect_config.md`, `docs/source/sdk/js/connect.md`): expanded integration coverage across relay runtime modes with live frame traffic and status-only probes by adding `connect_status_reports_unknown_strategy_as_local_only_with_p2p_attached` (on top of `connect_ws_broadcast_relay_updates_p2p_rebroadcast_counter`, `connect_ws_broadcast_without_p2p_increments_skipped_rebroadcast_counter`, `connect_ws_local_only_with_p2p_does_not_rebroadcast`, `connect_ws_relay_disabled_with_p2p_does_not_rebroadcast`, and `connect_status_reports_local_only_when_relay_disabled_with_p2p_attached`). Together these tests assert decentralized semantics end-to-end via `/v1/connect/status`: broadcast+P2P rebroadcasts over node-to-node transport, broadcast-without-P2P degrades to local-only with skipped counters (no centralized fallback), unknown strategies remain local-only even with attached P2P, and both `local_only` and `relay_enabled=false` never rebroadcast even when P2P is attached. JS SDK coverage now includes `getConnectStatus preserves relay-disabled effective local-only fields`, while Connect docs now clarify status JSON fields (`p2p_rebroadcasts_total`, `p2p_rebroadcast_skipped_total`) vs telemetry metric names and call out the relay-disabled effective-local-only case in the JS guide. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_torii/tests/connect_gating.rs` (ok), `node --test --test-name-pattern "getConnectStatus" javascript/iroha_js/test/toriiClient.test.js` (ok, 4 passed), `CARGO_HOME=/tmp/cargo_home_connect CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_connect_harden3 cargo test -p iroha_torii --test connect_gating connect_status_ -- --nocapture` (ok, 6 passed), `CARGO_HOME=/tmp/cargo_home_connect CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_connect_harden3 cargo test -p iroha_torii --test connect_gating --features ws_integration_tests -- --nocapture` (ok, 19 passed).
- NPoS performance integration-test stability (`integration_tests/tests/sumeragi_npos_performance.rs`): hardened metric polling to tolerate delayed/missing gauge emission in baseline sampling, aligned pacemaker jitter validation with current max-backoff-derived telemetry (`sumeragi_pacemaker_max_backoff_ms`), relaxed redundant-send/backlog waits to avoid false timeouts on low-activity runs, switched large payload submissions in performance scenarios from `submit_transaction_blocking` to `submit_transaction` to avoid pre-loop hangs, and widened `collect_precommit` EMA budget from 1500ms to 2500ms for release-binary localnet variance. Validation (direct test binary with prebuilt network binaries and `IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1`): `npos_baseline_1s_k3_captures_metrics` (ok), `npos_pacemaker_jitter_within_band` (ok), `npos_redundant_send_retries_update_metrics` (ok), `npos_rbc_chunk_loss_fault_reports_backlog` (ok).
- JS Torii client offline allowance/certificate regression fix (`javascript/iroha_js/test/toriiClient.test.js`): updated offline certificate draft/register/top-up test fixtures to include the required `certificate.operator` account id so the suite matches current SDK normalization (`normalizeOfflineCertificateDraft`). This resolves the previously failing offline tests (`issueOfflineCertificate*`, `registerOfflineAllowance`, `renewOfflineAllowance`, `topUpOfflineAllowance*`). Validation: `node --test --test-name-pattern "issueOfflineCertificate|registerOfflineAllowance|renewOfflineAllowance|topUpOfflineAllowance" javascript/iroha_js/test/toriiClient.test.js` (ok, 7 passed), `node --test javascript/iroha_js/test/toriiClient.test.js` (ok, 596 passed, 0 failed, 7 skipped).
- Iroha Connect hardening (Torii + SDKs): enforced strict contiguous per-direction sequence policy with session termination on violations (`connect_sequence_violation`), enforced roleŌåÆdirection validation at WS ingress (`connect_role_direction_mismatch`), added new Connect status counters, and added relay strategy hardening (`broadcast` vs `local_only`, unknown values forced to `local_only`) so relay behavior stays node-to-node on the Iroha P2P network without introducing centralized relay modes. JS queue journal now drops corrupted entries instead of failing decode paths, and JS connect error mapping now treats `HTTP 408/429` as retryable timeout/transport classes instead of broad auth errors. Python Connect codec loading now fails closed by default when the native extension is unavailable (stub requires explicit `IROHA_PYTHON_CONNECT_CODEC=stub`), and the Python stub codec replaced `pickle` payloads with deterministic JSON+base64url encoding. Swift `ConnectSession` mutable state is synchronized and flow-control consumption now happens only after key presence/decrypt success, with new concurrency and flow-control regression tests. Follow-up: removed a Torii Connect warning (`unused assignment`), aligned the plaintext-control post-approve regression test with strict first-frame sequencing for `AppToWallet`, added dedicated ingress helper coverage for role/direction mismatch closure, fixed relay ordering so dedupe runs before strict sequence checks (duplicates no longer close sessions), and added websocket integration coverage for both mismatch closure and duplicate-frame resilience over live WS sessions with status counter verification. Validation: `cd IrohaSwift && swift test --filter ConnectSessionTests` (ok, 8 passed); `cd javascript/iroha_js && IROHA_JS_DISABLE_NATIVE=1 node --test test/connectQueueJournal.test.js test/connectError.test.js` (ok, 21 passed); `CARGO_HOME=/tmp/cargo_home_connect CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_connect_harden3 cargo check -p iroha_torii --lib` (ok); `CARGO_HOME=/tmp/cargo_home_connect CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_connect_harden3 cargo test -p iroha_torii connect::tests:: -- --nocapture` (ok, 32 passed in `connect::tests`); `CARGO_HOME=/tmp/cargo_home_connect CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_connect_harden3 cargo test -p iroha_torii --test connect_gating --features ws_integration_tests connect_ws_closes_on_role_direction_mismatch -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed); `CARGO_HOME=/tmp/cargo_home_connect CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_connect_harden3 cargo test -p iroha_torii --test connect_gating --features ws_integration_tests connect_ws_duplicate_frame_does_not_close_session -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed); `CARGO_HOME=/tmp/cargo_home_connect CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_connect_harden3 cargo test -p iroha_torii --test connect_gating --features ws_integration_tests connect_ws_ -- --nocapture` (ok, 6 passed); `CARGO_HOME=/tmp/cargo_home_connect CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_connect_harden3 cargo test -p iroha_torii --test connect_gating --features ws_integration_tests connect_session_delete_rejects_ws_attach -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed); `CARGO_HOME=/tmp/cargo_home_connect CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_connect_harden3 cargo test -p iroha_torii --test connect_gating --features ws_integration_tests -- --nocapture` (ok, 10 passed).
- Iroha Connect decentralization/docs follow-up (`crates/iroha_torii/src/connect.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/tests/connect_gating.rs`, `javascript/iroha_js/src/toriiClient.js`, `javascript/iroha_js/test/toriiClient.test.js`, `docs/connect_config.md`, `docs/connect_examples_readme.md`, `docs/source/connect_architecture_strawman.md`, `docs/source/sdk/js/connect.md`, `roadmap.md`): removed the misleading unsupported-strategy test sentinel `centralized_gateway` in favor of neutral `bogus_strategy`, documented that relay forwarding is only local or Iroha P2P broadcast (no centralized relay server mode), documented roleŌåÆdirection mismatch closure + strict contiguous sequence behavior (with dedupe-before-sequence ordering and status counters), documented relay-strategy compatibility aliases (`local-only`/`local`), added `p2p_rebroadcasts_total` status telemetry, then added runtime relay-effectiveness reporting (`policy.relay_effective_strategy`, `policy.relay_p2p_attached`) and `p2p_rebroadcast_skipped_total` to surface cases where broadcast is configured but no P2P network handle is attached (effective local-only relay). Added assertions that unknown strategies coerce to `local_only`, parser/runtime normalization for aliases/case/whitespace, and rebroadcast behavior (`broadcast` with network attached, `broadcast` without network attached, `local_only`, and `relay_enabled=false`). JS `getConnectStatus` normalization now maps relay/decentralization fields and counters (`relayStrategy`, `relayEffectiveStrategy`, `relayP2pAttached`, `p2pRebroadcastsTotal`, `p2pRebroadcastSkippedTotal`, `sequenceViolationClosesTotal`, `roleDirectionMismatchTotal`) with updated unit expectations. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_torii/src/connect.rs crates/iroha_torii/tests/connect_gating.rs` (ok); `CARGO_HOME=/tmp/cargo_home_connect CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_connect_harden3 cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib connect::tests:: -- --nocapture` (ok, 33 passed); `CARGO_HOME=/tmp/cargo_home_connect CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_connect_harden3 cargo test -p iroha_torii --test connect_gating connect_status_ -- --nocapture` (ok, 3 passed); `node --test --test-name-pattern "getConnectStatus" javascript/iroha_js/test/toriiClient.test.js` (ok, 3 passed).
- `iroha_torii` MCP signed-query alias (`crates/iroha_torii/src/mcp.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/docs/mcp_api.md`): added `iroha.queries.submit` so agents can submit signed Norito query payloads through a stable alias instead of raw `torii.post_query`. The alias dispatches to `/query` and supports flat binary shortcuts matching transaction ergonomics: `signed_query_base64`/`query_base64` and `signed_query_hex`/`query_hex`/`body_hex` (hex decoded to bytes), plus optional `content_type`/`headers`/`accept`. Added `tools/call` dispatch wiring, tool schema registration, and tool-registry/list coverage assertions; expanded endpoint coverage for base64 and hex query shortcuts (error-surface checks on invalid bytes). Updated MCP docs alias inventory and binary query-submit examples. - `iroha_torii` MCP Connect SID ergonomics (`crates/iroha_torii/src/mcp.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/docs/mcp_api.md`): `connect.session.create` and `connect.session.create_and_ticket` now auto-generate a valid random base64url 32-byte SID when callers omit `sid`, so agents can bootstrap Connect flows without client-side SID generation. Added `build_connect_session_create_body` normalization (fills missing `sid`, preserves explicit `body.sid`, keeps `node` shortcuts), plus helper/unit coverage for generated SID format and body precedence. Expanded MCP endpoint coverage for both helper and namespaced aliases (`connect.*` and `iroha.connect.*`) verifying SID autogeneration works for create and create+ticket flows. Updated MCP docs to document optional SID behavior. Expanded list-surface assertions and endpoint alias coverage for the full allowance alias family, added helper unit coverage for certificate-id extraction, and documented new tools/examples in `mcp_api.md`. - `iroha_core` DA/RBC consensus bottleneck follow-up (`crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop/{reschedule.rs,qc.rs,block_sync.rs,validation.rs,main_loop.rs,tests.rs}`): implemented the pending backlog plan across quorum reschedule, idle view-change, QC missing-block retries, block-sync lock-conflict handling, and validation pre-gating. Key changes: (1) reschedule now uses progress stall age, defers near-quorum churn while `rbc_chunk_rx` is active, and only forces reassembly after availability timeout; (2) idle view-change now grants an RBC-progress grace window after timeout when backlog is still converging; (3) missing-block fetch retry windows widen when RBC session progress is observed; (4) block-sync locked-chain conflicts are prefiltered and warning-throttled under a dedicated conflict kind; (5) ahead-of-tip pending blocks defer validation and request missing parents before static validation dispatch. Added coverage for the new retry-window and near-quorum deferral paths plus updated existing backlog/validation tests. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop/tests.rs` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_core --lib defer_qc_if_block_missing_widens_retry_window_when_rbc_progresses -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_core --lib reschedule_defers_near_commit_quorum_while_rbc_chunks_arrive -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_core --lib force_view_change_if_idle_defers_after_timeout_while_rbc_backlog_progresses -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_core --lib validation_defers_block_ahead_of_local_height -- --nocapture` (ok), plus regression spot-checks `defer_qc_if_block_missing_uses_rebroadcast_cooldown` and `reschedule_defers_quorum_timeout_while_rbc_incomplete` (ok).
- `iroha_torii` MCP offline allowance/receipt alias coverage follow-up (`crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/docs/mcp_api.md`, `roadmap.md`): extended MCP integration coverage and docs for already-implemented offline aliases so agents can reliably discover and call allowance/receipt routes through Torii MCP. Added tool-list assertions for `iroha.offline.allowances.list`, `iroha.offline.allowances.query`, `iroha.offline.receipts.list`, and `iroha.offline.receipts.query`; added endpoint alias dispatch tests for flat query/query-envelope shortcuts on all four tools; and documented the aliases/examples in `mcp_api.md` alongside the existing offline transfer/settlement section. - Izanami long-run validation rerun (state-view contention follow-up XXXIV) with `RUST_LOG=izanami::summary=info,izanami::workload=warn`, `IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_KEEP_DIRS=1`, `IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PARALLELISM=1`, `IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PERMIT_DIR=$(mktemp -d)`, `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_izanami_longrun`, and `cargo run -p izanami --release --locked -- --allow-net --nexus --peers 4 --faulty 0 --duration 3600s --target-blocks 2000 --progress-interval 10s --progress-timeout 300s --tps 5 --max-inflight 8 --workload-profile stable`: stopped before target with `izanami run stopped before target blocks reached`; final lane-000 heights converged at `1420` on all peers (`blocks.hashes` bytes `45440` each). - `iroha_torii` MCP offline settlement aliases (`crates/iroha_torii/src/mcp.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/docs/mcp_api.md`, `roadmap.md`): added agent-facing settlement tools `iroha.offline.settlements.list`, `iroha.offline.settlements.get`, `iroha.offline.settlements.query`, and `iroha.offline.settlements.submit` so AI agents can inspect settlement bundles and submit settlement transactions via flat MCP names. The aliases support `bundle_id_hex`/`bundle_id` shortcuts, flat query/query-envelope fields for list/query routes, and flat body shortcuts for settlement submission (`authority`, `private_key`, `transfer`) when `body` is omitted. Added registry/list assertions and endpoint alias coverage for list/detail/query/submit dispatch paths. - `iroha_torii` MCP Connect create+ticket error-path follow-up (`crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/docs/mcp_api.md`, `roadmap.md`): added regression coverage to ensure `connect.session.create_and_ticket` and `iroha.connect.session.create_and_ticket` forward non-`2xx` session-create responses unchanged (and do not emit ticket payloads) when create fails. Updated docs to state success (`2xx`) returns `{create,ticket}`, while non-`2xx` returns raw create response. - `iroha_torii` MCP Connect create+ticket alias (`crates/iroha_torii/src/mcp.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/docs/mcp_api.md`, `roadmap.md`): added one-call Connect bootstrap tools `connect.session.create_and_ticket` and `iroha.connect.session.create_and_ticket` so agents can create a Connect session and immediately receive a role-matched WebSocket ticket in one MCP call. The dispatcher enforces `role` (`app`/`wallet`), reuses existing `connect.session.create` + `build_connect_ws_ticket` paths, forwards non-2xx create responses unchanged, accepts `ticket_node_url` override (`node_url`/`node` fallbacks), and returns structured output with `status`, `sid`, `role`, `create`, and `ticket`. Added tool-list and endpoint dispatch coverage for both names plus docs/examples for one-call flow. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_torii/src/mcp.rs crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --test mcp_endpoints -- --nocapture` (ok, 70 passed), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib mcp::tests:: -- --nocapture` (ok, 32 passed), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib openapi::tests::generated_spec_includes_documented_paths -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/var/folders/n2/xxntlr312qbfdnp0j1xp52hw0000gn/T/iroha_target_connect_mcp_check2 CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 cargo check -p iroha_torii` (ok).
- `iroha_core` state-view contention follow-up XXXIV (`crates/iroha_core/src/{gossiper.rs,queue.rs}`, `roadmap.md`): reduced gossip-admission transaction-index contention by reusing one committed-transactions snapshot per received gossip batch and threading it through known-hash/duplicate checks; eliminated duplicate routing work in gossip enqueue by reusing precomputed local routing via `push_with_gossip_payload_with_state_and_routing` (instead of rerouting on push); and reduced queue-drain contention by reusing one committed-transactions snapshot per `pop_from_queue_with_state` drain loop (instead of checking committed membership through `state.has_committed_transaction` on every popped hash). Queue reroute/gossip-state paths continue to use per-pass committed snapshots and fallback state-view caching (`reroute_pending_transactions_with_state`, `gossip_batch_with_state`). Added regression coverage for precomputed-route enqueue (`push_with_gossip_payload_with_state_and_routing_skips_router_lookup`). Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_core/src/gossiper.rs crates/iroha_core/src/queue.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing_b cargo check -p iroha_core --lib` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing_b cargo test -p iroha_core --lib push_with_gossip_payload_with_state_and_routing_skips_router_lookup -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing_b cargo test -p iroha_core --lib route_for_gossip_with_state_ -- --nocapture` (ok, 3 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing_b cargo test -p iroha_core --lib queue_accepts_gossip_payload_cache_with_state -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing_b cargo test -p iroha_core --lib gossip_skips_already_known_transaction_hashes -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing_b cargo test -p iroha_core --lib gossip_drops_route_mismatch -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing_b cargo test -p iroha_core --lib gossip_accepts_restricted_route_match -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing_b cargo test -p iroha_core --lib reroute_pending_transactions_with_state_uses_view_router_fallback -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing_b cargo test -p iroha_core --lib gossip_batch_with_state_skips_committed_entries -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing_b cargo test -p iroha_core --lib queue_throttling -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed).
- Integration tests (`integration_tests/tests/sumeragi_negative_paths.rs`, `crates/iroha/src/client.rs`, `crates/iroha_core/src/state.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/src/{lib.rs,routing.rs}`): fixed consensus evidence posting/listing regressions (operator signature headers, Norito-framed payloads, PRF-seed-aware validation, improved client-side error decoding) and repaired mode-cutover validation/flagging in detached state merges so invalid `NextMode`/`ModeActivationHeight` updates are rejected without poisoning the block. Enabled `telemetry_profile=developer` for the Sumeragi negative-path suite so evidence list/count endpoints are reachable for persistence assertions. Validation: `RUST_TEST_THREADS=1 cargo test -p integration_tests --test sumeragi_negative_paths -- --nocapture` (ok).
- Integration tests (`crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop.rs`, `crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop/tests.rs`, `integration_tests/tests/sumeragi_lock_convergence.rs`): surfaced Sumeragi view-change index in the telemetry `/status` `view_changes` gauge (`Telemetry::set_view_changes`) and stabilized the restart lock-convergence integration test by polling until locked-QC entries converge after restart progress. Fixes `sumeragi_view_change_lock_convergence` timeouts and `sumeragi_restart_retains_lock_convergence` race failures. - `iroha_torii` MCP transaction wait alias (`crates/iroha_torii/src/mcp.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/docs/mcp_api.md`, `roadmap.md`): added `iroha.transactions.wait` so agents can wait on a known transaction hash without re-submitting payloads. The alias accepts `hash`/`transaction_hash`/`query.hash`, reuses submit-and-wait polling controls (`timeout_ms`, `poll_interval_ms`, `terminal_statuses`, `status_accept`), and shares the existing terminal-status polling helper (now supports optional submit metadata so both submit+wait and hash-only wait paths use one code path). Added tool-registry + hash-alias helper unit coverage, list-surface assertions for the new alias, and endpoint coverage for invalid-hash surfacing (`mcp_jsonrpc_tools_call_agent_alias_transaction_wait_accepts_flat_hash`). Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_torii/src/mcp.rs crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs` (ok), `cargo check -p iroha_torii` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --test mcp_endpoints -- --nocapture` (ok, 69 passed), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib mcp::tests:: -- --nocapture` (ok, 32 passed), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib openapi::tests::generated_spec_includes_documented_paths -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed).
- `iroha_torii` MCP contract call-and-wait alias (`crates/iroha_torii/src/mcp.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/docs/mcp_api.md`, `roadmap.md`): added `iroha.contracts.call_and_wait` so agents can invoke `/v1/contracts/call` and wait for terminal pipeline status in one MCP call. The alias reuses contract call request-body shortcuts, accepts wait controls (`timeout_ms`, `poll_interval_ms`, `terminal_statuses`, `status_accept`), auto-resolves `tx_hash` from contract-call responses (`tx_hash_hex`/`tx_hash`/`transaction_hash`) with optional hash override, and reuses the shared transaction-status polling path (retrying transient `404`/`429`/`5xx` until timeout). Added helper coverage for `tx_hash_hex` extraction, list-surface assertions for the new alias, and endpoint coverage for submit-error surfacing (`mcp_jsonrpc_tools_call_agent_alias_contract_call_and_wait_surfaces_submit_error`). Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_torii/src/mcp.rs crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs` (ok), `cargo check -p iroha_torii` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --test mcp_endpoints -- --nocapture` (ok, 68 passed), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib mcp::tests:: -- --nocapture` (ok, 31 passed), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib openapi::tests::generated_spec_includes_documented_paths -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed).
- `irohad` state-view contention follow-up XXXIII (`crates/irohad/src/main.rs`, `roadmap.md`): removed runtime `state.view()` snapshots from startup/runtime flows by switching to narrow state accessors (`committed_height`, `world_view`, `query_view`, `commit_topology_snapshot`, `pipeline_snapshot`) and refactoring local consensus-cap helper usage to world+height inputs (`compute_consensus_handshake_caps` now delegates to `compute_consensus_handshake_caps_from_world` instead of requiring `StateView`). This covers snapshot-load height logging, replay catch-up height checks, handshake-cap/confidential digest derivation, genesis topology/bootstrap parameter checks, NPoS stake-snapshot roster peer extraction, and DAG recovery prepass strategy lookup. Updated related manifest/consensus helper tests in `irohad` to pass world+height. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/irohad/src/main.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing cargo check -p irohad` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing cargo test -p irohad consensus_caps_follow_activation_height -- --nocapture` (ok; 2 test binaries passed, 0 failed).
- `iroha_core`/`iroha_torii` state-view contention follow-up XXXII (`crates/iroha_core/src/block.rs`, `roadmap.md`): reduced block-validation lock contention by removing full `state.view()` snapshots from `ValidBlock::validate_keep_voting_block_inner` and `ValidBlock::validate_keep_voting_block_with_events`. State-dependent static validation now runs on `state.query_view()` (`validate_static_state_dependent` narrowed to `StateReadOnly`), and committed-transaction heights are prefetched from `state.transactions.view()` via `committed_heights_for_block` then passed to `validate_static_with_snapshot`, so transaction-index locks are not held across signature batching/stateless validation work. Updated static-snapshot tests to use the committed-height snapshot path. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_core/src/block.rs crates/iroha_core/src/query/snapshot/mod.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing cargo check -p iroha_core --lib` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing cargo check -p iroha_torii` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing cargo test -p iroha_core --lib validate_static_snapshot_ -- --nocapture` (ok, 2 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing cargo test -p iroha_core --lib snapshot_iterable_ -- --nocapture` (ok, 2 passed), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib handle_queries_iterable_assets_non_empty -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed).
- `iroha_core`/`iroha_torii` state-view contention follow-up XXXI (`crates/iroha_core/src/query/snapshot/mod.rs`, `roadmap.md`): removed full-view acquisition from the shared query snapshot lane by switching `run_on_snapshot_with_mode` from `state.view()` to `state.query_view()`. This keeps query validation/execution semantics unchanged (`StateReadOnly` surface) while avoiding transaction-index/coarse view-lock acquisition in Torii query execution paths that use snapshot lane helpers. - `iroha_core`/`iroha_torii` state-view contention follow-up XXIX (`crates/iroha_core/src/state.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/src/lib.rs`, `roadmap.md`): removed additional Torii runtime full-view reads on startup/test harness content-config snapshot paths by adding a narrow `State::content_snapshot` accessor and switching Torii initialization reads from `state.view().content.clone()` to `state.content_snapshot()`. - `iroha_torii` MCP transaction submit-and-wait alias (`crates/iroha_torii/src/mcp.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/docs/mcp_api.md`, `roadmap.md`): added `iroha.transactions.submit_and_wait` so AI agents can submit signed transactions and wait for terminal pipeline outcomes in one MCP tool call (default terminal states: `Committed`, `Applied`, `Rejected`, `Expired`). The alias reuses transaction payload shortcuts (`signed_tx_base64`/`tx_base64`/hex aliases), supports polling controls (`timeout_ms`, `poll_interval_ms`, `terminal_statuses`, `status_accept`), decodes transaction-submission receipts to resolve `tx_hash` automatically (with optional `hash`/`transaction_hash` override), and retries transient status polling HTTP responses (`404`, `429`, `5xx`) until timeout. Added unit coverage for receipt hash extraction/status parsing/terminal-status validation and endpoint coverage for alias error-surface behavior on invalid payloads. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_torii/src/mcp.rs crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs` (ok), `cargo check -p iroha_torii` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --test mcp_endpoints -- --nocapture` (ok, 67 passed), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib mcp::tests:: -- --nocapture` (ok, 30 passed), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib openapi::tests::generated_spec_includes_documented_paths -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed).

Updated core block-proof coverage to call the new state accessor (`block_proofs_for_entry_produce_valid_merkle_paths`) and revalidated Torii block-proof endpoint behavior (`block_proof_handler_emits_norito`). Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_core/src/state.rs crates/iroha_torii/src/lib.rs` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing cargo check -p iroha_core --lib` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing cargo check -p iroha_torii` (ok), `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/iroha_target_perf_keepgoing cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib block_proof_handler_emits_norito -- --nocapture` (ok, 1 passed).
- `iroha_core` state-view contention follow-up XXIV (`crates/iroha_core/src/{gossiper.rs,queue.rs}`, `roadmap.md`): removed additional gossip-admission `state.view()` contention by switching gossiper route verification and enqueue to state-based queue APIs (`Queue::route_for_gossip_with_state`, new `Queue::push_with_gossip_payload_with_state`) and dropping the legacy view-based gossip routing helper from `Queue`. This avoids holding a full state snapshot across gossip batch route checks + enqueue admission. Added queue unit coverage for the new state-based gossip enqueue API (`queue_accepts_gossip_payload_cache_with_state`) and updated route helper coverage (`route_for_gossip_with_state_uses_router_decision` plus existing no-state/fallback tests), with gossip duplicate-skip behavior revalidated (`gossip_skips_already_known_transaction_hashes`). - `iroha_torii` MCP contract alias expansion (`crates/iroha_torii/src/mcp.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/docs/mcp_api.md`, `roadmap.md`): added agent-facing contract lifecycle aliases `iroha.contracts.code.register`, `iroha.contracts.code.get`, `iroha.contracts.deploy`, `iroha.contracts.instance.create`, `iroha.contracts.instance.activate`, `iroha.contracts.call`, and `iroha.contracts.state.get` so AI agents can register/deploy/call contracts and query contract state through MCP without raw OpenAPI tool names. Added `code_hash`/`hash` shortcuts for contract-code/state lookups and flat-body fallback handling for contract write endpoints when `arguments.body` is omitted. Expanded MCP endpoint tests with list-surface assertions plus contract alias dispatch checks, and refreshed MCP docs with contract examples. Torii transaction submission now enqueues through `push_with_lane_with_state` in `handle_transaction_inner`, and lane-lifecycle queue refresh now uses `reconfigure_nexus_with_state` in `handle_post_nexus_lane_lifecycle` instead of taking a full `StateView`. - `iroha_core`/`iroha_torii` state-view contention follow-up (`crates/iroha_core/src/{queue.rs,gossiper.rs,state.rs,block_sync.rs,sumeragi/mod.rs,sumeragi/main_loop.rs}`, `crates/iroha_torii/src/lib.rs`, `roadmap.md`): added borrowed-view queue admission helper `Queue::push_with_gossip_payload_in_view()` and switched both inbound gossip handlers to reuse a single batch `StateView` instead of reacquiring per transaction; switched outbound gossip batching from `Queue::gossip_batch(..., &StateView)` to the new narrow-state path `Queue::gossip_batch_with_state(..., &State)` and replaced outbound commit-topology reads with `State::commit_topology_snapshot()`; rewired block-sync share selection/QC derivation paths to use `committed_height()` + Kura scans + `world_view()`/`block_sync_qc_for_world()` (removing full `state.view()` in `GetBlocksAfter` response assembly); added queue pending probe `Queue::contains_pending_hash()` and switched Torii pipeline status queued-detection to it (removes another full `state.view()`); switched ISO status settlement checks to `State::has_committed_transaction()` and submission receipt height stamping to `State::committed_height()`; switched Sumeragi commit-QC tally validation, collector-parameter reads, and tick-heartbeat height reads from full `state.view()` to `world_view()`/`load_npos_collector_config_from_world()`/`committed_height()`; added narrow state accessors `prev_block_hash_fast()` and `committed_transaction_height()` plus unit coverage (`committed_transaction_height_reads_transactions_index`, `prev_block_hash_fast_reads_block_hash_journal`, `queue_accepts_gossip_payload_cache_in_shared_view`, `contains_pending_hash_ignores_committed_entries`, `gossip_batch_with_state_skips_committed_entries`, `load_npos_collector_config_from_world_matches_view_loader`); rewired block-sync `GetBlocksAfter` requests to use `prev_block_hash_fast()`/`latest_block_hash_fast()` and Torii `pipeline_status_from_state` to use `committed_transaction_height()` without taking a full state view. - Integration tests (`integration_tests/tests/sumeragi_commit_certificates.rs`): fixed `npos_commit_quorum_requires_stake` + `permissioned_commit_certificates_reach_quorum` by preserving custom genesis blocks in `iroha_test_network` (augmenting them with required consensus handshake metadata instead of rebuilding), removing duplicated `Accept` headers in `iroha::client`, and improving commit-quorum status snapshots to fall back to QC signer bitmaps when commit signatures are absent. Validation: `cargo fmt --all` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_test_network with_genesis_block_uses_custom_builder -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_test_network genesis_is_cached_and_deterministic -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p integration_tests --test sumeragi_commit_certificates -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (ok).
- Integration tests/unstable network: stabilized `extra_functional::unstable_network::unstable_network_9_peers_3_faults` by broadcasting the mint transaction to all peers after recovery (avoids losing the tx across view changes) and by demoting noisy `TEST_NETWORK client ...` prints to `tracing::debug!` in the test-network client factory. Validation: `cargo fmt --all` (ok), `IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PARALLELISM=1 IROHA_TEST_SKIP_BUILD=1 TEST_NETWORK_BIN_IROHAD=target/debug/iroha3d IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PERMIT_DIR=$(mktemp -d) cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod extra_functional::unstable_network::unstable_network_9_peers_3_faults -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (ok).
- `iroha_core` state-view contention reduction continuation (`crates/iroha_core/src/{state.rs,gossiper.rs,block_sync.rs,sumeragi/main_loop/block_sync.rs,telemetry.rs}`): added `State::has_committed_transaction()` and switched gossiper duplicate checks to this narrow transactions-only lookup; moved gossiper route-catalog reads to `nexus_snapshot()` and hoisted tx-acceptance parameter snapshots (`max_clock_drift`, `tx_limits`, `crypto`) to once-per-batch reads. Added `BlockSynchronizer::block_sync_qc_for_world()` and rewired block-sync main-loop QC candidate/validation/tally paths that only require world parameters to use `world_view()` + `committed_height()` instead of full `state.view()`. Telemetry periodic sync now uses `world_view()` plus a lightweight genesis timestamp read (`committed_height()` + Kura block #1) instead of a full `StateView` snapshot. Added unit coverage for `State::has_committed_transaction()` and world-snapshot block-sync QC derivation parity. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_core/src/state.rs crates/iroha_core/src/gossiper.rs crates/iroha_core/src/block_sync.rs crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop/block_sync.rs crates/iroha_core/src/telemetry.rs` (ok), `cargo check -p iroha_core --lib` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_core --lib has_committed_transaction_reads_transactions_index -- --nocapture` (blocked by pre-existing `crates/iroha_core/src/kiso.rs:752` missing `mcp` field in `Torii` initializer), `cargo fmt --all` (still blocked by pre-existing duplicate module path: `crates/iroha_core/tests/test_world.rs` and `crates/iroha_core/tests/test_world/mod.rs`).
- Torii MCP alias ergonomics follow-up (`crates/iroha_torii/src/mcp.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/docs/mcp_api.md`): added explicit dispatchers for `iroha.accounts.*`/`iroha.transactions.*` aliases with flat argument shortcuts so agents can call account/transaction tools without nested envelopes (`account_id`, `hash`, `literal`, top-level query fields, plus transaction payload aliases `signed_tx_base64`/`tx_base64` and hex aliases `signed_tx_hex`/`tx_hex`/`body_hex`). Added account-inspection aliases `iroha.accounts.assets`/`iroha.accounts.permissions`, query-oriented aliases `iroha.accounts.query`, `iroha.accounts.transactions.query`, `iroha.accounts.assets.query` with flat QueryEnvelope shortcuts (`filter`, `sort`, `limit`, `offset`, `fetch_size`, `address_format`) when `body` is omitted, and account onboarding alias `iroha.accounts.onboard` with flat `alias`/`account_id` shortcuts. Updated alias schemas/descriptions and docs to reflect shortcut arguments and clarified `tools/call.result.isError` behavior for HTTP `>= 400`. Added integration coverage for onboarding + query aliases plus existing flat hash/account/tx shortcuts, and unit coverage for query-envelope/onboarding body construction helper paths in MCP dispatch code. Validation: `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_torii/src/mcp.rs crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs` (ok), `cargo check -p iroha_torii` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --test mcp_endpoints -- --nocapture` (ok, 32 passed), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib mcp::tests:: -- --nocapture` (ok, 11 passed), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib openapi::tests::generated_spec_includes_documented_paths -- --nocapture` (ok).
- `iroha_core` state-view contention reduction follow-up (`crates/iroha_core/src/{state.rs,block_sync.rs,telemetry.rs,sumeragi/mod.rs,sumeragi/main_loop.rs,sumeragi/main_loop/commit.rs}`): replaced hot full-state reads in block sync with narrow accessors (`committed_height`, `latest_block_hash_fast`, `world_view`) for height/tip/peer checks, added `State::commit_topology_snapshot()` for cheap fallback-topology reads, reused a single per-entry state snapshot in `filter_blocks_with_valid_signatures` for context/signature/QC sanitization, switched `block_signatures_valid` to consume an existing `StateReadOnlyWithTransactions` snapshot (avoids internal `state.view()` reacquisition), moved roster metadata + consensus-mode derivation onto `world_view`, and added world-snapshot `NPoS` timeout helpers (`resolve_npos_block_time_from_world`, `resolve_npos_timeouts_from_world`) so commit quorum/rebroadcast/quorum timeout helpers avoid full `StateView` acquisition in hot loops. Added `pending_fast_path_timeout_current()` so commit-path fast-timeout checks no longer need ad-hoc `state.view()` acquisition while preserving compatibility for existing call sites/tests through the legacy wrapper signature. Telemetry local-peer removal checks now use `world_view` instead of a full `StateView`. Validation: `cargo fmt --all` (fails in workspace due existing duplicate module path `crates/iroha_core/tests/test_world.rs` and `crates/iroha_core/tests/test_world/mod.rs`), `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_core/src/state.rs crates/iroha_core/src/block_sync.rs crates/iroha_core/src/telemetry.rs crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/mod.rs crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop.rs crates/iroha_core/src/sumeragi/main_loop/commit.rs` (ok), `cargo check -p iroha_core --lib` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_core --lib block_sync::message::filter_tests::filter_blocks_replaces_qc_with_wrong_signer_bitmap -- --nocapture` (blocked by pre-existing compile error in `crates/iroha_core/src/kiso.rs`: `Torii` initializer missing `mcp` field).
- Torii native MCP bridge (`crates/iroha_torii/src/{lib.rs,mcp.rs,openapi.rs}`, `crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/docs/mcp_api.md`, `crates/iroha_config/src/parameters/{defaults.rs,user.rs,actual.rs}`, `crates/iroha_config/tests/fixtures.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/src/test_utils.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/tests/connect_gating.rs`): added `torii.mcp` config (`enabled`, request/body/tool limits, operator-route exposure, rate/burst), wired `/v1/mcp` GET (capabilities) + POST (JSON-RPC `initialize`, `tools/list`, `tools/call`) into Torii with OpenAPI-derived tool registry + internal route dispatch, added Connect helper MCP tools (`connect.ws.ticket`, `connect.session.create/delete`, `connect.status`) plus namespaced Connect aliases (`iroha.connect.ws.ticket`, `iroha.connect.session.create/delete`, `iroha.connect.status`), added stable agent-friendly account/transaction aliases (`iroha.accounts.list`, `iroha.accounts.resolve`, `iroha.accounts.transactions`, `iroha.transactions.submit`, `iroha.transactions.status`), added Connect ergonomics (`connect.session.create` accepts top-level `sid`/`node` shortcuts and `connect.ws.ticket` accepts role-matched `token_app`/`token_wallet` aliases), added MCP OpenAPI tag/path docs, documented MCP usage/examples for Connect session lifecycle plus account queries and transaction submission, and added router-level MCP integration coverage for capabilities/list/call (including OpenAPI-derived `torii.healthCheck` route dispatch), token-gated access behavior (forbidden without inbound `x-api-token`, accepted with valid MCP request header), forwarded-header dispatch behavior (API-version rejection via `tools/call.arguments.headers`), JSON-RPC protocol validation (non-object payload + unsupported `jsonrpc` version), JSON-RPC batch execution/empty-batch rejection, unknown-tool invalid-params handling, invalid JSON, rate limiting, oversized payload rejection, disabled-route gating, account/transaction/connect tool discovery via paginated `tools/list`, account-transaction tool path/query argument dispatch, agent-alias dispatch for account list/tx status/connect lifecycle validation, binary `/transaction` dispatch through both `torii.post_transaction` and `iroha.transactions.submit`, and verified MCP-driven Connect session lifecycle dispatch (`connect.session.create` -> `connect.ws.ticket` -> `connect.status` -> `connect.session.delete`) plus namespaced alias dispatch (`iroha.connect.session.create` -> `iroha.connect.ws.ticket` -> `iroha.connect.status` -> `iroha.connect.session.delete`). Validation: `cargo check -p iroha_torii` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --test mcp_endpoints -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib mcp::tests:: -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_torii --lib openapi::tests::generated_spec_includes_documented_paths -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_config --test fixtures -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo fmt --all` (fails in workspace due existing duplicate module path `crates/iroha_core/tests/test_world.rs` and `crates/iroha_core/tests/test_world/mod.rs`), `rustfmt --edition 2024 crates/iroha_config/src/parameters/actual.rs crates/iroha_config/src/parameters/user.rs crates/iroha_torii/src/lib.rs crates/iroha_torii/src/mcp.rs crates/iroha_torii/src/openapi.rs crates/iroha_torii/tests/mcp_endpoints.rs` (ok).
- Sumeragi adversarial test stabilization (`integration_tests/tests/sumeragi_adversarial.rs`): hardened two flaky assertions to use cluster-wide status sampling instead of a single peer-local counter for receiver-side events. `run_conflicting_ready_scenario` now sums `consensus_message_handling{kind="rbc_ready",outcome="dropped",reason="invalid_signature"}` across all validators before/after the scenario, and `run_locked_qc_gate_drop_scenario` now samples `block_created_dropped_by_lock_total`/`block_created_proposal_mismatch_total` across the validator set (with monotonic lock-drop expectation + mismatch invariance). Validation: `cargo fmt --all` (ok), `cargo test -p integration_tests --test sumeragi_adversarial sumeragi_adversarial_conflicting_ready_marks_invalid -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p integration_tests --test sumeragi_adversarial sumeragi_adversarial_locked_qc_gate_rejects_conflicting_proposal -- --nocapture` (ok), and chained rerun of both commands (ok).
- Test-network permit namespace isolation (`crates/iroha_test_network/src/lib.rs`): default permit paths are now namespaced by parent process (`$TMPDIR/iroha_test_network_permits/ppid-<parent_pid>`) when `IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PERMIT_DIR` is unset, so unrelated concurrent Cargo invocations no longer block each other on the same global permit lock. Explicit `IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PERMIT_DIR` still overrides this behavior. Added coverage for env override precedence and parent-PID namespacing (`permit_dir_env_override_wins`, `default_permit_dir_is_namespaced_by_parent_pid`). Validation: `cargo fmt --all` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_test_network permit_dir -- --nocapture` (ok). Runtime verification: default `address_canonicalisation` run acquires `.../iroha_test_network_permits/ppid-<cargo_pid>/permit-0.lock` even while legacy root `permit-0.lock` is held by another long-running test process.
- Test-network permit wait diagnostics (`crates/iroha_test_network/src/lib.rs`): added explicit permit-holder summaries (`slot/pid/alive/started/file`) while waiting on `NetworkBuilder::build()`, and default-bounded permit waits (5 minutes) so blocked integration runs no longer wait forever. Override with `IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PERMIT_WAIT_TIMEOUT` (plain seconds or `ms` suffix), or disable the timeout explicitly via `IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PERMIT_WAIT_TIMEOUT=0`. Added unit coverage for default/override timeout parsing, holder-summary formatting, and timeout panic behavior (`network_permit_wait_timeout_env_override_applies`, `describe_permit_holders_reports_lock_owner`, `acquire_network_permit_panics_after_wait_timeout`). Validation: `cargo fmt --all` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_test_network permit_ -- --nocapture` (ok), `IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PERMIT_WAIT_TIMEOUT=3 cargo test -p integration_tests --test address_canonicalisation accounts_listing_emits_ih58_identifiers -- --nocapture` (expected fail-fast with permit holder details; lock owned by PID `39475`), `IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PERMIT_DIR=$(mktemp -d) IROHA_TEST_NETWORK_PERMIT_WAIT_TIMEOUT=30 cargo test -p integration_tests --test address_canonicalisation accounts_listing_emits_ih58_identifiers -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` (ok).
- Time-trigger integration test stabilization (`integration_tests/tests/triggers/time_trigger.rs`): hardened submit-peer selection in `leader_client_for_submit` so leader hints are only trusted when the reporting peer is sufficiently connected; otherwise the test now falls back to a rotating peer choice across the most up-to-date peers (by best-effort block height), preventing repeated routing to a weak peer and reducing `Network overall height did not pass given predicate` flakes in `triggers::time_trigger::time_trigger_scenarios`. Added helper unit tests for connection thresholds and fallback peer rotation. Validation: `cargo fmt --all` (ok), `cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod triggers::time_trigger::time_trigger_scenarios -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p integration_tests --test mod triggers::time_trigger::timeout_tests -- --nocapture` (ok).
- Subscription billing trigger re-registration fix (`crates/iroha_core/src/smartcontracts/ivm/host.rs`): `subscription_bill` now strips reserved lifecycle metadata keys (`__registered_block_height`, `__registered_at_ms`) before re-registering the next billing trigger. This prevents trigger registration rejection (`Metadata key '__registered_at_ms' is reserved for trigger lifecycle management`) and restores invoice persistence in `integration_tests/tests/subscriptions.rs`. Added unit-test coverage that includes runtime registration metadata and verifies the sanitized re-registration metadata. Validation: `cargo fmt --all` (ok), `cargo test -p integration_tests --test subscriptions subscription_scenarios -- --nocapture` (ok), `cargo test -p iroha_core --lib subscription_bill_ -- --nocapture` (ok).

New gates now require per-track command evidence in `status.md` + artifact/log paths for Sumeragi gap fixes (`iroha_core` lib sumeragi tests + `integration_tests` `sumeragi_da` + ignored `sumeragi_localnet_smoke`), DA/Torii refactor (`iroha_torii`, `iroha_core` overlay libs, `integration_tests` `mod`/narrowed subset), and frame-cap validation (same Sumeragi matrix).

- `iroha_core`/`iroha_torii`/`integration_tests` STARK prove parity follow-up (`crates/iroha_core/src/{zk.rs,zk_stark.rs,pipeline/overlay.rs,lib.rs,smartcontracts/isi/world.rs}`, `crates/iroha_core/tests/zk_stark.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/src/lib.rs`, `crates/iroha_test_network/src/lib.rs`, `integration_tests/tests/zk_stark_network.rs`, `crates/iroha_torii/docs/zk_app_api.md`, `docs/source/zk_app_api.md`, `crates/iroha_config/src/parameters/{defaults.rs,user.rs,actual.rs}`, feature wiring in `crates/iroha_torii/Cargo.toml`, `crates/irohad/Cargo.toml`, `integration_tests/Cargo.toml`): completed `stark/fri-v1` prove-path parity for Torii `/v1/zk/ivm/prove` by dispatching to backend-specific proving (Halo2 existing path + STARK native envelope synthesis), emitting proof attachments tagged with the selected backend, and accepting STARK VK/circuit ids for `ivm-execution-v1`. Added deterministic STARK envelope synthesis/prover helpers and unit tests in core (`prove_stark_fri_open_verify_envelope`, `prove_stark_fri_ivm_execution_envelope`, synthesized envelope verifier tests), added `iroha_test_network` forwarding for `TEST_NETWORK_IROHAD_FEATURES`, added a 4-peer STARK governance+shielded integration test (`stark_governance_and_shielded_ivm_paths`) with backend-mismatch negative coverage for both governance ballots and `IvmProved` admission, added mixed-governance backend coverage in core (`governance_accepts_valid_halo2_and_stark_ballots_in_same_state`) to validate that valid Halo2 and STARK ballots are both accepted under one state context, and added overlay-level STARK shielded-admission tests (`overlay_accepts_ivm_proved_with_stark_execution_circuit`, `overlay_rejects_stark_ivm_proved_when_circuit_id_mismatch`) to validate acceptance and circuit-binding rejection on the `Executable::IvmProved` path. Added explicit shared backend/circuit policy constants (`ZK_BACKEND_HALO2_IPA`, `ZK_BACKEND_STARK_FRI_V1`, `IVM_EXECUTION_V1_CIRCUIT_ID`) and `is_ivm_execution_backend(...)` so Torii/core allowlist checks remain aligned, enforced STARK governance role-circuit matching in shared vote helpers (`vote-ballot-v1` and `vote-tally-v1`) via `voting_circuit_matches(...)`/`ensure_voting_circuit_role(...)`, and clarified config docs/comments that STARK acceptance requires both `zk-stark` build support and runtime opt-in (`zk.stark.enabled=true`).
